scripts.html:
RANDOM TOPICS COMBO 3

26. IDENTIFICATION CARDS

  1. Vocabulary

1

citizen’s identity card (n) thẻ căn cước công dân

7

efforts paid off (phr) nỗ lực được đáp trả

2

birth certificate (n) giấy khai sinh

8

issue (v) cấp (căn cước công dân)

3

driver’s license (n) bằng lái xe

9

be pulled over by a police officer (v) cảnh sát giao thông dừng xe

4

serve a purpose of (phr) phục vụ mục đích

10

The Vietnamese Passport Application Đơn xin cấp hộ chiếu

5

notify (v) thông báo

11

Personal Information Biography Sơ yếu lí lịch

6

obtain (v) đạt được,có được

12

  1. Questions

What kind of identification cards do you have now? Tell me in detail when you use them.

Types of questions: Mô tả sự vật

Main points:

Nói về những thẻ định danh mà bạn có

Bạn sử dụng chúng khi nào

I'd like to know about the procedures you required in getting an identification card. Please give me a detailed description of them from start to finish.

Types of questions: Miêu tả một hoạt động chi tiết theo trình tự

Main points:

Quy trình bạn cần thực hiện để lấy được thẻ định danh là gì

Bạn làm gì trước tiên, sau đó bạn làm gì?

How did you feel when you first got an identification card? When was it? What was the card about? Tell me all the details.

Types of questions: Miêu tả

Main points:

Kể về lần đầu tiên bạn nhận một chiếc thẻ định danh

Đó là khi nào? Thẻ đó về định danh về điều gì?

  1. Model answers

What kind of identification cards do you have now? Tell me in detail when you use them.

**Intro:**

I have different types of identification cards like my citizen ID card, birth certificate, driver’s license, and passport.

**Body:**

These cards look a bit similar, but they each have a different job.

First, most of these cards are small, rectangular, and have my personal details like my signature, photo, and date of birth.

Each card has a unique purpose. For example, the citizen ID card is very important for every Vietnamese person. I use it to prove who I am when I do things like open a bank account or sign documents in Vietnam.

The driver’s license is another type of ID. It shows that I am allowed to drive. When a police officer stops me, I show my driver’s license to prove that I am a legal driver.

**Closing:**

So, these are the types of identification cards that I have.

Intro

I have various kinds of identification cards such as citizen identity cards, birth certificates, driver’s licenses, and passports

Body

These cards are somewhat similar to each other in terms of form, but they are different when it comes to function.

First, these cards often come in the shape of small rectangles with my personal information such as my signature, my photograph, and my date of birth on them.

In terms of function, each type of card serves a different purpose.

For example, a citizen ID card is the most important personal document of each and every Vietnamese.

I use it to verify my identity when I perform any transactions here in Vietnam.

Another kind of identification card is a driving license which helps identify me as a licensed driver.

Its purpose is to notify police officers that I have obtained my driver’s license and that I am legally allowed to ride a motorbike or drive a car.

I have to show my driver’s license when you are pulled over by a police officer.

Closing

So, that’s all I want about the kinds of identification cards that I have.

I'd like to know about the procedures you required in getting an identification card. Please give me a detailed description of them from start to finish.

**Intro:**

To get a passport in Vietnam, there are several steps you need to follow.

**Body:**

First, you need to gather all the required documents. These include an application for the passport, a biography, and a copy of any Vietnamese ID documents, like a birth certificate or identity card.

After you have collected these documents, you fill out forms like the Vietnamese Passport Application and the Personal Information Biography.

Next, put all the documents and forms in an envelope. Then, send the envelope to the Vietnam Immigration Department for processing.

It usually takes about 5 days to get your passport, so all you have to do now is wait.

**Closing:**

That’s all you need to know about getting a passport in Vietnam.

Intro

There are several things you need to do in order to get a passport in Vietnam.

Body

The first thing you need to do is to gather all of the required documents.

These documents include an application for passport issuance, a biography, and a copy of any Vietnamese personal identification documents such as a birth certificate and an identity card.

Once these documents have been collected, you can proceed to fill out forms such as The Vietnamese Passport Application and the Personal Information Biography.

Next, you put all of the required documents and forms into an envelope.

Then, you send the package to the Vietnam Immigration Department for processing.

It takes about 5 days for your passport to be issued, so now all you need to do is to wait.

Closing

That’s all about the things you need to do in order to get a passport in Vietnam.

How did you feel when you first got an identification card? When was it? What was the card about? Tell me all the details.

The feeling I had when I first got my passport is wonderful. My passport is an official document from the Vietnamese government. It has important information like my name, photo, address, date and place of birth, and blank pages for travel stamps. This document is needed to travel between Vietnam and other countries.

I remember the exact date I got my passport: December 1, 2016. I was so happy because I knew I was one step closer to my dream of studying abroad. I had wanted to study overseas since I was a child. I worked very hard every day and joined many competitions.

In the end, my hard work paid off when I won a scholarship to a university in the USA. Once I was accepted into that university, I started preparing the necessary documents, and my passport was one of them. Getting my passport reminded me that my dream had come true. That’s why I felt so happy when I first received it.

Intro

Well, the feeling that I had when I first got my passport is still fresh in my mind.

Body

My passport is an official identification document issued by the Vietnamese government.

It includes some information such as my name, photo, address, date and place of birth as well as blank pages for travel stamps.

This identification document is required to travel between my home country, Vietnam, and all foreign countries.

I still remember exactly the date when I got my passport, it was on December 1, 2016.

At that moment, I was over the moon because I knew that I was one step closer to my dream which was studying abroad.

I had been dreaming of studying overseas since I was a little kid.

Therefore, I worked very hard every day, and I participated in as many competitions as I could.

Finally, my efforts paid off when I won a scholarship to a university in the USA.

Once I knew that I was accepted to that university, I proceeded to prepare some required documents, with my passport being one of them.

Closing

Getting my passport reminded me of the fact that my dream had been come true.

This is the reason why I felt that happy when I first got it.

Hello, Ava. Nice to meet you. Let me tell you about myself.

My name is Huy. I was born in 1990 and come from Hanoi, but I currently live in Thai Nguyen City. I’m an introverted person. My family consists of four people: my wife, my two daughters, and me.

I’m working as an automation engineer for a Korean company called Samsung, located in Thai Nguyen. one of the biggest companies in the world, At work, I have a lot of coworkers. They are all very hardworking, kind and helpful. My working environment is modern and professional.

My hobbies include listening to music and watching movies. That’s a bit about me.

---

Mở bài

  • Hello, Ava. Nice to meet you. Let me tell you about myself.

Bản thân

My name is …

I was born in…

I was born in Hanoi.

Tôi sinh ra ở Hà Nội.

I’m married with … kids / a son / a daughter.

Tôi đã kết hôn và có …(bao nhiêu) con / một con trai / một con gái.

I married with 2 daughter, older one is 7 and other one is 5.

My wife is same age as me and she is a blogger.

I’m single / in a relationship.

Tôi độc thân / đang có người yêu.

I am very happy at home.

Tôi rất hạnh phúc khi ở nhà.

I love my family and I always try to spend more time with them.

Tôi yêu gia đình và luôn cố dành thời gian bên họ.

Sở thích

I am good at V-ing

I am good at playing chess.

Tôi chơi cờ giỏi.

I … whenever I’m free.

I play football whenever I’m free.

I hang out with friends whenever I’m free.

I enjoy + V-ing.

I enjoy cooking meals for my family.

It helps me to relax after a long working day/week.

Nó giúp tôi thư giãn sau 1 ngày / tuần làm việc dài.

It helps me to bond with my coworkers / my family.

Nó giúp tôi kết nối / thân hơn với đồng nghiệp / gia đình

It helps me to gain more knowledge.

Nó giúp tôi có thêm nhiều kiến thức.

Công việc

I’m working as a ___ (job) for Samsung Vietnam - one of the biggest companies in the world.

I’m lucky to work here.

Tôi may mắn khi được làm việc ở đây.

At work, I have a lot of coworkers. They are all very hardworking, kind and helpful.

My working environment is modern and professional.

Môi trường làm việc của tôi hiện đại và thân thiện.

The best thing about my workplace is…

Điều tuyệt nhất ở chỗ tôi làm là…

  • the high salary - lương cao (đây chỉ là bài thi, người ta đánh giá mình dùng tiếng Anh thế nào chứ không quan tâm mình lương cao hay không nên a/c đừng ngại nói ý này)
  • the modern facilities - CSVC hiện đại;
  • understanding managers - các quản lý tâm lý với nhân viên,
  • the opportunities to improve my skills - cơ hội phát triển kỹ năng
  • the staff trainings - Các buổi đào tạo nhân viên

My job is stressful sometimes but I think it’s good because I can be more patient.

Công việc của tôi đôi lúc căng thẳng nhưng tôi nghĩ đó là điều tốt vì tôi có thể trở nên kiên nhẫn hơn

I hope to speak English well in the future to have more promotion chances / to travel on more business trips.

Tôi hy vọng sẽ nói tiếng Anh tốt trong tương lai để có nhiều cơ hội thăng tiến / để đi công tác nhiều nơi.

Tính cách

Everyone says that I am very (tính cách) so they love me so much. They like to be around me.

Mọi người nói là tôi rất … nên họ rất yêu quý tôi. Họ thích ở bên cạnh tôi.

funny

kind

honest - thật thà

trustworthy - đáng tin cậy

caring - quan tâm người khác

responsible - có trách nhiệm

Kết bài:

That is all about me. I hope I can get a high score in OPic. Thank you.

Introduce My self

Now I'll introduce myself. My name is Huy. I was born in 1990. I come from Ha noi, but now I live in Thai Nguyen city.  I’m an introverted person. When it comes to the family, My family has 4 people, my wife, my 2 daughter and me.

Currently,  I’m working as an automation engineer for a Korean company located in Thai Nguyen called Samsung. It’s a big company . The job is not hard but the pressure is real. My hobbies are listening to music and watching movies .It's all about me

Tell me about your family members

Now I will tell you about family members. In my family, there are 4 people: my wife, my 2 daughter and me. My wife is the same age as me and she is a blogger. We have two daughters. The older one is 7 years old, and the younger one is 5. They both love playing outside and enjoy reading books together.

Can you tell me about one of your best friend

Now I would like to tell you about my best friend. His name is Sơn, He is twenty - five years old. We went to the same university and he sat right next to me actually.Currently,  He and I both work for Samsung as automation engineers. He is very friendly and hard working. He is one of my best friends .

Memories with my friend

Now I will tell you about one of the  memories with my best friend. It was the first time my friend and I cooked something together. We cooked tofu with pork. My friend and I burned it because we didn’t know how to make it.That was the most memorable thing to me

Music

❓1A - You indicated in the survey that you listen to music.

What kinds of music do you listen to?

Who are some of your favorite musicians or composers?

❓1B- You indicated that you like to listen to music. What type of music do you like listening to? Plus, who is your favorite singer or composer? What is special about his or her music?

❓1C- You indicated in the survey that you enjoy listening to music. What type of music do you usually listen to? What do you like about it? Who is your favorite musician or group? Tell me everything about why they are your favorite. 

I listen to various types of music. I am especially interested in pop music and one of my favorite singers is Adele.

Adele is one of the biggest music artists in the world. I adore her because she has such a beautiful voice and amazing personality. Through her music, I can express how I feel and stay positive.

Meanwhile, I also like Taylor Swift because she is very talented and all of her songs are very catchy and trendy. Her concerts get sold-out quickly and she makes the crowds go crazy by her performances.

Both Adele and Taylor are very popular and the most successful artists of all time.

So, these are the two pop singers I like the most.

❓2A - When and where do you usually go to listen to music?

Do you listen to the radio? Do you go to concerts?

Tell me about the different ways you enjoy music.

❓2B - I'd like to know more about your interest in listening to music. When do you usually listen to music? Where do you most enjoy listening to music? Do you go to any concerts? Do you go to any other place for live music? Tell me everything about how you listen to music.

❓2C- When and where do you like to listen to music? Why do you listen to music?

When it come to music . I am a big fan of movie. It change my moods

I often use different devices to listen to music like my TV, my phone and my laptop. At home , I just open the TV and listen to music while doing other things. When I have to go somewhere far away. I just put on my ear phones and listen to music from my lovely phone. Plus, I listen to music when I'm on the bus getting to work, I feel relax and motivated to start my day.

So, I listen to music on my phone whenever I want to.

❓3 - When did you first become interested in music?

What kinds of music did you like at first?

Tell me how your interest in music developed from your childhood until today

I first became interested in music when I was in high school. At that time, there was a singer in Vietnam named Khanh Phuong and he was very famous for his popular song “Chiec khan gio am".

He was very good looking and he had a unique voice. I used to listen to the song over and over again. But as I got older, I started to listen to many types of music. I sometimes listen to pop music, but I am sometimes in the mood for hip hop. I sometimes enjoy rock music when I'm feeling excited.

❓4- Could you think back to a particularly memorable time when you heard live music?

When was it? Where were you? Who were you with?

What happened that made that performance so memorable?

I remember going to a concert with my friends 2 years ago.

It was a new year concert which took place in the capitial of Vietnam. It’s Hanoi

There were many people at the concert and everybody was having a great time.

The mood of the concert was amazing because there were so many famous singers and we all enjoyed live performances. We were dancing to the music and singing to the songs during the concert.After that, we watched the fireworks as we welcomed the new year.

Looking back, it was one of the most memorable concerts in my life.

Topic: Movies

❓1 - You indicated in the survey that you like to watch movies. What kinds of movies do you like to watch? Why do you like those types of movies?

When it comes to movies, I am a big fan of action movies. 

I feel excited in every single action scene.

Plus, action movies are very well-made nowadays, so they are always my first choice when I go to the cinema. 

I am also into Korean movies. 

They are usually about family and relationships. They are doing verywell at the office, so I enjoy watching them with my family. 

Once again, I am interested in action movies and Korean movies.

❓2 - Tell me about when you went to the movies recently.

Who did you go with and how was that day?

What did you do before the movie and what did you do after?

👉🏻 I remember going to the cinema with my friends recently.

Before watching the movie, we go on the internet and see what movies available

We decided to watch Kungfu panda and then we booked the tickets online

When we arrived to the cinema, we got our tickets and bought some popcorn & coke

The movie was amazing. After watching movie we usually eat something with my friend

So, that was the last time I went to the movie

❓3 - What was a memorable movie that you watched in the past? What was it about? What was special about that movie?

Sample:

I remember watching Kungfu panda with my friend two months ago. It was a Animation movie producted by Dream works Animation. It was about big Panda who was not to good at martial art but he always got lucky . The scence were impressive and the movie had many visual effects. It was a box office hit . So Kungfu panda is the most memorable movie in my life

❓4 - Tell me about the movie theater you typically go to. What is it like? Describe a movie theater you often visit in as much detail as possible. 

Sample:

I am a big fan of movies. But my works is quite busy so when I have free time . I go to the threater near my house. The theater name is Quabong which mean the Ball in english. It about fiften minutes on foot from my house. There are a few reasons why I like it . First of all ,It had good facilties . Second of all , It has the best popcorn and coke in the city. Last but not least , there are lots of places to eat and shop near the theater. So this is threater I often see a movie

Park

❓1 - You indicated in the survey that you go to parks with adults. Tell me about the kinds of parks that you like to visit. What do the parks look like? (Miêu tả công viên)

There is a park near my house where I can take walks and get some exercise.

It is a small park but It had a lot of sports facilities, such as tennis courts, basketball courts, running and outdoor fitness

Besides, there is a bigger park near my company. It is a riverside park so it has a great view of the river so many people go there to enjoy the great view and get some fresh air. Moreover, it has an indoor swimming pool and a camping ground so it is a perfect place for families to spend their weekends. 

So, these are two parks that I like to visit.

❓2 - Describe what a typical visit to a park is like for you. Tell me about the things you do and see at parks. (Một chuyến công viên điển hình của bạn? Bạn thường thấy gì và làm gì ở công viên?)

I usually go to parks to get some fresh air. 

I sometimes take walks in the park. 

Also, I sometimes walk my dog there. 

Plus, I sometimes sit on a bench and relax. 

Also, I sometimes just enjoy the breeze. 

Plus, I sometimes just enjoy the trees and flowers. 

Also, I take pictures at the park from time to time. 

So, these are the things I typically do at parks.


❓3 - Tell me about the last time you went to a park. Which park was it? When was it that you went? Tell me everything you did from the moment you arrived at the park to the time you left. (Kể về lần cuối cùng/ gần đây nhất đi tới công viên. Bạn Đã làm gì từ lúc đến công viên cho tới khi rời đi)

I remember going to the park near my house recently to take walks. I went there with my mother after dinner.

I wanted to get some fresh air and clear my mind. After the walk, my mother and I sat down on a bench and we started to talk about things that happened. I felt lucky because my mother was with me and she gave me great advice. 

After that, we walked back home. I felt very refreshed.  

I think parks are great place to reduce stress and stay positive again. 

So, this was what I did at the park recently.


❓4 - Tell me about a memorable experience you had at a park. Maybe there was a special event, or maybe something unexpected happened. Begin by giving me some background about when and where it was. And then, give me all the details about what happened. (Kể về một kỉ niệm đáng nhớ ở công viên)

I remember bumping into my old friend at a park near my house last year.

I was taking walks to get some exercise.

Suddenly, I heard someone calling my name, I looked back and I saw my old friend from high school. 

I went to her and said hi, I was very surprised and excited to see her after a long time.

Then, we walked around the park. We enjoyed the beautiful scenery and took many photos together. After that, we sat down on a bench and talked together. It was very nice to see my friend again. Before leaving, we shared our contacts
So, this was a memorable experience at the park I remember.

❓5 - How did you first start going to parks? What made you visit parks in the first place? Why do you go to parks now? (Trước đây bạn đi công viên làm gì? Bây giờ bạn đi công viên làm gì.)

I first started to go to parks to get some fresh air. 

I wanted to be in an open space to enjoy the trees and flowers, so I go to parks on weekends.  

I usually sat on a bench and enjoyed the atmosphere.

But nowadays, I go to parks to get some exercise in order to keep fit

I go there to take walks whenever I can. I feel very refreshed after taking walks. 

Sometimes, I go to parks to play badminton with my friends. 

I think parks are ideal places to be physically active. 

So, this is why I started to take walks at parks.

❓6 - You indicated in the survey that you like to take walks. Talk about the things you do when you go for walks. Where do you normally go and how do you feel after taking walks?

I usually go for a park to get some exercise. 

I often go to a park near my house to take walks. 

When I am walking, I always listen to music because it helps me relax and clear my mind. 

I usually bring with me a bottle of water

After the walks, I feel refreshed and active, so I can stay positive. 

So, these are things I do when I take walks in the park


❓7 - Tell me about the last time you went for a walk. Where did you go and what happened? What did you do to prepare for the walk? What did you do after you were done? 

I remember taking walks in the park near my house last week. 

Before the walk, I had some snacks because I was hungry after work. 

I brought a bottle of water with me in case I was thirsty. 

I was walking around the park when it started to rain. I had to run home as fast as I could. 

when I got home, but I felt very tired after the walk. 

Next time, I think I should check the weather before I go for a walk. 

So, this was the last time I took walks. 

Weather

❓1 - Tell me about the weather at where you live. What is the weather like in each season? Which season do you personally like?


I live in Hanoi

There are 4 seasons here: spring, summer, autumn, and winter.

In spring, it is usually rainy and humid.

Summer is my favorite season. It is hot but I love sunshine, and it is a perfect time for a family vacation at a beach.

Autumn lasts from August to October. It is often windy and stormy.

The last season of the year is winter. the weather is usually freezing.

So, I think I like summer the most. 

❓2 - How is the weather today at where you are? Is it cold, is it warm? 

Talk about today's weather in detail.

currently , it is summer in Hanoi.

❓ 5 - Tell me about the outdoor activities that are popular in your country. Do people go hiking bike, or swim?

What do people typically do outdoors?

❓ 8 - Please tell me about what kinds of free time activities people in your country do.

Sample:

People in my country do many outdoor activities.

(There are a lot of popular activities people like to do in Vietnam.)

First, a lot of people like to travel to the beaches in the summer

because Vietnam is famous for beautiful white sand beaches 

Next, at weekends, people like to take walks in the park.

Walking helps them keep fit and stay healthy.

Sometimes, they go camping or have a campfire with their family and friends.

So these are the popular outdoor activities in my country.

2 - Tell me about outdoor activities you engage in.

How does the geography of your country help you do that activity?

What do you usually do?

How often do you do it?

Who do you do it with?

Give me all the details.

I’d like to go to the beach in the summer.

When I go to the beach I don’t like to get too dark.

So I first put on some sunblock during the day.

I like to swim in the ocean.

I play with the sand or play with a ball on the beach as well.

At night many people enjoy themselves at the beachside.

I also go out for food and drinks with people.

I sometimes play with some firecrackers on the beach.

I like taking walks along the beach.

It feels great to get some fresh air.

Last of all, I like to watch the sunrise or the sunset at the beach.

So these are the things I do when I'm at the beach.

 1 - Tell me about some popular holidays In your country

Where do people typically celebrate these holidays?

What kinds of things do they do to celebrate?

Tet and Mid-Autumn are the most popular holidays in Vietnam.

Family members get together at their houses to celebrate the biggest holiday of the year.

They ask how each other is doing and do some catching up. 

They cook traditional food and enjoy meals together. 

Plus, they give all family members the best wishes. 

Also, They go to the pagoda to pray for health and good luck.

So, these are the things people do during family gatherings.

 2 - Talk about a holiday memory from your childhood

Tell me where you were and what that place looked like

Tell me everything that you remember from that holiday scene.

I remember going to my uncle’s place with my parents when l was a kid.

It was a national holiday. 

After having dinner, we had a campfire in the backyard of my uncle’s house.

My uncle played the guitar and we all sang along to the songs. 

We played some board games and we had so much fun.

Then, we watched the fireworks together. It was very beautiful because it was the first time I saw fireworks. 

Looking back, it was a special holiday at my uncle’s place.

 3 - Talk about the most recent holiday you celebrated.

Why was that holiday memorable:

Was there anything special about that day

Talk about why that holiday was particularly unforgettable.

I remember going to my friend's house on the national holiday a few weeks ago. 

We had dinner together and had some drinks. 

However, I drank quite a lot that day because the drink tasted so good. 

I got very drunk because I drank too much. I could not walk straight and I felt dizzy. So, my friend had to drive me home. 

I had a headache the next day. I had to take a day off work because I was very tired.

Since then, I try to be more careful when I'm drinking

- 1 - I’d like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out.

You have arrived in a new city and you're trying to stay for the night

- 2 - I’m sorry but there is a problem you need you to resolve.

You've learned that there are no rooms available in this hotel

Call your travel companions to let them know about the situation.

Leave a message to describe the situation and propose alternative solutions to the problem.

   

Câu chào hỏi

Hello guys. It’s me, Emma. 

Câu hoàn cảnh

I have some bad news   

I just talked to the hotel.

They told me that the hotel is fully booked.

Câu giải pháp

 

Can you tell me what you want to do?

Why DON'T we go next time?

Or, maybe we could go another time.

    

Can you tell me what you think?

I'm fine with whatever you decide.

- 3 - That's the end of the situation.

Think about a time when your travel plans did not work out as expected.

    I remember when I was supposed to go on a trip with my friends.

I had a fever and bad cough

I had to stay inside and isolate myself from everyone.

They felt bad because I couldn’t go on the trip and hoped that I could recover soon. 

In the end, I told them to go without me and have fun on the trip. 

    Looking back, it was a pity that I missed the trip that time.

I found out about a new food store near my house from my friend.

At first, I was impressed because the store was very big.
