scripts.name: Tell us about yourself
scripts.html:
Tell us about yourself

My full name is Do Xuan Huy. I was born in 1990 in Thanh Hoa, and now I live in Ha Noi.

I attended Electric Power University, where I majored in Automation Technology. My hobbies include playing games, reading books, and camping.

I love R&B music, it's something which clears my mind whenever I meet problems in my life. It’s half of my soul. I like heavy metal rock, too. It breaks my head but then it sends me to a peaceful place where I feel comfortably. Sometimes I listen to the blue music, it’s really good, too.

I like playing and watching football with my friends, we usually gather and play it every Sunday. It’s a fun and healthy sport.

I’m an easy going person that works well with everyone. I enjoy being around different types of people and I like to always challenge myself to improve at everything I do.

I believe my strongest trait is my attention to detail. This trait has helped me tremendously in this field of work.

This might be bad, but in college I found that I procrastinated a lot. I realized this problem, and I’m working on it by finishing my work ahead of schedule. I feel my English ability is my weakest trait. I know this is only a temporary problem. I’m definitely studying hard to communicate more effectively.

My short term goal is to find a position where I can use the knowledge and strengths that I have. I want to partake in the growth and success of the company I work for. I want to become a valued employee of a company. I want to make a difference and I’m willing to work hard to achieve this goal. I don’t want a regular career, I want a special career that I can be proud of.

I have never had a wish like many of my friends, I don’t like dreaming too much, I think life is not a dramatic movie and all the things I have to do is try my best on everytihng I do.

I think I like the University, the teachers, the students, the lessons… everything there. This place’s a good invironmental science for the young people like me.

SKILL

- Computer Skills: hardware, software proficiency, word, excel, good typing ability. The Experience in the installation and maintenance of computers.

- Communication skills: communication, good presentation, time management skills, effective teamwork, adapting quickly to new circumstances and new technology.

- Enthusiastic, responsible for assigned work and have the ability to work under pressure and intense.

ACTIVITIES

- Participation in volunteer activities, sports activities of the school and class.

- Participation in the exchange, sharing of some technology forum.

HOBBIES

- Reading books, update to news on technology and life.

- Passion to learn and improve knowledge in new areas, especially in the technology, electrical and electronic.

- I want to experience the reality of technical machinery to accumulate experience and improve skills.

- Participation in sports and social activities.

scripts.name: Music - Answers
scripts.html:
1A - You indicated in the survey that you listen to music.

What kinds of music do you listen to?

Who are some of your favorite musicians or?

1B- You indicated that you like to listen to music. What type of music do you like listening to? Plus, who is your favorite singer or composer? What is special about his or her music?

1C- You mentioned in the survey that you enjoy listening to music. What kind of music do you usually listen to?Who i What do you like about it? s your favorite musician or band? Tell me everything about why they are your favorite.

I listen to various types of music. I am especially interested in pop music, and one of my favorite singers is Adele.

Adele is one of the biggest music artists in the world. I adore her because she has such a beautiful voice and amazing personality. Through her music, I can express how I feel and maintain a positive outlook.

Meanwhile, I also like Taylor Swift because she is very talented and all of her songs are very catchy and trendy. Her concerts sell sold-out quickly, and she makes the crowds go crazy with her performances.

Both Adele and Taylor are very popular and the most successful artists of all time.

So, these are the two pop singers I like the most.

2A - When and where do you usually go to listen to music?

Do you listen to the radio? Do you go to concerts?

Tell me about the different ways you enjoy music.

2B - I'd like to know more about your interest in listening to music. When do you usually listen to music? Where do you most enjoy listening to music? Do you go to any concerts? Do you go to any other place for live music? Tell me everything about how you listen to music.

2C- When and where do you like to listen to music? Why do you listen to music?

I usually listen to music on my cell phone, so I can listen to music whenever I am in the mood for it.

I most often listen to music in my room because it is my favorite place to de-stress.

Relieve stress

Relax

Unwind

Boost my energy

I am not very good at singing but I feel confident when I am alone singing to my favorite songs.

Plus, I listen to music when I'm on the bus getting to work. I usually listen to fast-paced songs, so I feel energetic and motivated to start my day.

So, I listen to music on my phone whenever I want to.

3 - When did you first become interested in music?

What kinds of music did you like at first?

Tell me how your interest in music developed from your childhood until today

I first became interested in music when I was in secondary school. At that time, Britney Spears was very popular. She was very famous for her popular song “Baby One More Time".

She was very good-looking and she had a unique voice. I used to listen to the song over and over again.

But as I got older, I started to listen to various types of music. I usually listen to pop music, but I am sometimes in the mood for hip hop. I also often enjoy rock music when I'm feeling excited.

So, I listen to various = many types of music now.

4- Could you think back to a particularly memorable time when you heard live music?

When was it? Where were you? Who were you with?

What happened that made that performance so memorable?

I remember going to a concert with my friends 2 years ago.

It was a New Year's concert which took place in downtown Hanoi.

There were many people at the concert and everybody was having a great time.

The mood of the concert was amazing because there were so many famous singers and we all enjoyed live performances. We were dancing to the music and singing the songs during the concert.

After that, we watched the fireworks as we welcomed the new year.

Looking back, it was one of the most memorable concerts in my life.

scripts.name: Movies
scripts.html:
Topic: Movies

❓1 - You indicated in the survey that you like to watch movies. What kinds of movies do you like to watch? Why do you like those types of movies?

Sample: (Lựa chọn những dấu chấm, không cần chọn hết)

When it comes to movies, I like/am interested in/a big fan of:

  • action movies. Action movies are very exciting and there are many action scenes. I always feel excited when I watch them.

Plus, I like:

  • comedies. They are really fun/funny and entertaining.
  • romantic movies / Korean movies. They are about family and relationships, so / that’s why they are very moving.
  • animations. Because there are many cute characters. My kid is a big fan of them. The plot/storyline is / The storylines are simple and I can enjoy animations with my family on the weekend.

Once again, / So, ____ and _____ are my favorite types of movies/movie genres.

Bài mẫu cụ thể:

When it comes to movies, I am a big fan of action movies.

I feel excited in every single action scene.

Plus, action movies are very well-made nowadays, so they are always my first choice when I go to the cinema.

I am also into Korean movies.

They are usually about family and relationships. They are sometimes very entertaining and moving, so I enjoy watching them with my family.

Once again, I am interested in action movies and Korean movies.

❓2 - Tell me about when you went to the movies recently.

Who did you go with and how was that day?

What did you do before the movie and what did you do after?

Sample: (Lựa chọn những dấu chấm, không cần chọn hết)

👉🏻 I remember going to the cinema with my friends recently.

Before watching the movie, we:

  • decided to watch/picked an action movie (it was Mission Impossible / Captain America / Kong)
  • and then we booked the tickets online 🎫

When we got/arrived to the cinema, we:

  • got our tickets
  • and bought some popcorn & soft drinks 🍿🥤
  • The movie was amazing/exciting.

We had (such) a great time there.

After that, we:

  • ate out at a restaurant (nearby)
  • went home & had dinner
  • grabbed some drinks at a bar 🍺

and talked about that movie.

(We also planned for the next movies to watch later.)

It was a nice/pleasant evening for us.

(So, that was the last time I went to the movie)

Bài mẫu cụ thể:

I remember going to the cinema with my friends recently.

We had to queue in long lines to buy tickets because there were a lot of people at the cinema.

Before the movie, we got some popcorn and soft drinks.

The movie was amazing and we had a great time there.

After watching the movie, we went to a decent Korean restaurant near the cinema. They had the best Korean food in town.

I ordered spicy chicken. It tasted so good because I was starving after the movie. We talked about the movie while enjoying the food and we had such a great time.

So, it was a pleasant evening for us.

❓3 - What was a memorable movie that you watched in the past? What was it about? What was special about that movie?

Sample:

👉🏻 Phim “Titanic”

I remember watching Titanic with my family last year. It was a romantic movie from Hollywood. 💕

  • It starred (Leonardo Di Carpio) my favorite actor (The main character was …)

It was about 2 people falling in love (on a luxurious cruise) (In the movie, a poor artist and a rich girl fell in love on a cruise.) 🧑🏻‍🎨🙋🏻‍♀️

However, in the end:

  • They could not be together. ❌
  • The cruise broke and sank. (Vỡ và chìm) 🛳️
  • The man tried to save his love and sacrificed/died. 💔

The scenes were impressive

  • and the movie had many visual effects.

It (was a box-office hit and) became famous all over the world.

(I highly recommend it.)

So Titanic is the most memorable movie in my life.

(So my all-time favorite movie is Titanic. )

👉🏻 Phim “Kong”

I remember watching the movie King Kong at Galaxy cinema a few months ago.

It was a sci-fi movie, which was about a giant gorilla trying to protect his land from the invasion of bad people. 🦍

In the end, the gorilla became the king of his land and lived freely in nature.

This movie was a big hit since it was filmed in Vietnam. I like the beautiful scenes of Vietnam’s breathtaking landscapes in the movie.

The movie attracted a lot of people in Vietnam. It did very well at the box office.

So, King Kong was one of the most memorable movies in my life.

❓4 - Tell me about the movie theater you typically go to. What is it like? Describe a movie theater you often visit in as much detail as possible.

Sample:

Rạp gần nhà → Đông → Các phòng chiếu: 3D, 4D, 12 phòng → Thích vì: gần, nhiều chỗ ăn / mua sắm.

👉🏻 I usually go to a large theater near my house called CGV.

It is on a busy street with a lot of foot traffic. 🐾

🕶️ They have 3d and 4d, and an imax theaters there.

There are about 12 theaters (altogether) , so you always have a lot to choose from./ of choices.

  • In the theaters, there are special seats for couples 💑. Also, the screens are huge.

I like going there because it’s close to my house.

🛍️ Plus, there are lots of places to eat and shop near the theater.

(So you can do other stuff/many things before and after movies.)

🚗 Last of all, it’s easy to park there because there is plenty of parking space.

Last of all, The service is excellent because the staffs are professional & helpful.

scripts.name: Parks
scripts.html:
1 - You indicated in the survey that you go to parks with adults. Tell me about the kinds of parks that you like to visit. What do the parks look like? (Miêu tả công viên)

There is a park in my neighborhood where I can take walks and get some exercise.

It has a children's playground and a lot of sports facilities, such as tennis courts, basketball courts, running and cycling tracks.

Besides, there is a bigger park near my company. It is a riverside park so it has a great view of the river so many people go there to enjoy the great view and get some fresh air. Moreover, it has an indoor swimming pool and a camping ground so it is a perfect place for families to spend their weekends.

So, these are two parks that I like to visit.

2 - Describe what a typical visit to a park is like for you. Tell me about the things you do and see at parks. (Một chuyến công viên điển hình của bạn? Bạn thường thấy gì và làm gì ở công viên?)

I usually go to parks to get some fresh air.

I sometimes take walks in the park.

Also, I sometimes walk my dog there.

Plus, I sometimes sit on a bench and relax.

Also, I sometimes just enjoy the breeze.

Plus, I sometimes just enjoy the trees and flowers.

Also, I take pictures at the park from time to time.

So, these are the things I typically do at parks.

3 - Tell me about the last time you went to a park. Which park was it? When was it that you went? Tell me everything you did from the moment you arrived at the park to the time you left. (Kể về lần cuối cùng/ gần đây nhất đi tới công viên. Bạn Đã làm gì từ lúc đến công viên cho tới khi rời đi)

I remember going to the park near my house recently to take walks. I went there with my wife after dinner.

I wanted to get some fresh air and clear my mind. After the walk, my wife and I sat down on a bench and we started to talk about things that happened. I felt lucky because my wife was with me and she gave me great advice.

After that, we walked back home. I felt very refreshed.

I think parks are great place to relieve stress and stay positive again.

So, this was what I did at the park recently.


4 - Tell me about a memorable experience you had at a park. Maybe there was a special event, or maybe something unexpected happened. Begin by giving me some background about when and where it was. And then, give me all the details about what happened. (Kể về một kỉ niệm đáng nhớ ở công viên)

I remember bumping into my old friend at a park near my house last year.

I was taking walks to get some exercise.

Suddenly, I heard someone calling my name, I looked back and I saw my old friend from high school.

I went to her and said hi, I was very surprised and excited to see her after a long time.

Then, we walked around the park. We enjoyed the beautiful scenery and took many photos together. After that, we sat down on a bench and started to ask how each other was doing and did a lot of catching up.

It was very nice to see my friend again. Before leaving, we shared our contacts and we have been in touch ever since.

So, this was a memorable experience at the park I remember.

5 - How did you first start going to parks? What made you visit parks in the first place? Why do you go to parks now? (Trước đây bạn đi công viên làm gì? Bây giờ bạn đi công viên làm gì.)

I first started to go to parks to get some fresh air.

I wanted to be in an open space to clear my mind and relax, so I went to parks on weekends.

I usually sat on a bench and enjoyed the breeze.

But nowadays, I go to parks to get some exercise in order to keep fit= stay in shape.

I go there to take walks whenever I can. I feel very refreshed after taking walks.

Sometimes, I go to parks to play badminton with my friends.

I think parks are ideal places to be physically active.

So, this is why I started to take walks at parks.

scripts.name: Walking
scripts.html:
1. You indicated in the survey that you like to take walks. Talk about the things you do when you go for walks. Where do you normally go and how do you feel after taking walks?

Enthusiastic

Passionate

I usually go for a walk to get some exercise at a park near my house.

When I am walking, I always listen to music because it helps me relax and clear my mind.

I usually bring with me a bottle of water to keep hydrated.

I sometimes wear my headphones or earphones to listen to the news when I am taking walks.

After the walks, I feel refreshed and active, so I can stay positive.

So, these are things I do when I take walks.

  1. Tell me about the last time you went for a walk. Where did you go and what happened? What did you do to prepare for the walk? What did you do after you were done?

Trainers = Sneakers

I remember taking walks in the park near my house last week.

Before the walk, I had some snacks because I was hungry after work.

I brought a bottle of water with me in case I was thirsty.

I was walking around the park when it started to rain. I had to run home as fast as I could.

I was a little wet when I got home, but I felt very active and energetic after the walk.

Next time, I think I should check the weather forecast before I go for a walk.

So, this was the last time I took walks.

Ideas:

I remember going for a walk to a park nearby/near my place yesterday alone

Before going out of the house / before I walked, I made sure to (đảm bảo, chắc chắn là):

  • Check the weather / see the weather forecast
  • Bring my water bottle with me
  • Wear my sneakers and sports clothes
  • Bring my cell phone and wear my headphones

When I was walking:

  • I enjoyed the fresh air and the view (in the park)
  • I listened to audiobooks
  • I talked to my family on the phone

The weather was sunny and windy.

After that, I:

  • Sat on the bench (to relax / rest)
  • Bought some snacks / a can of soda home
  • Returned home and
  • had lunch / dinner / a meal (bữa ăn)
  • took a shower
  • went to bed because I was tired

I felt relaxed and refreshed.

So, that was my last walk (yesterday)

  1. Now tell me why you started to take walks in the first place?

How has your interest in taking walks changed over the years? Why do you take walks now?

Before, I first started walking because I was fat/overweight/unhealthy.

Walking helped me to:

  • lose weight
  • stay healthy
  • keep a positive attitude
  • clear my mind
  • be physically active
  • be more creative

Since then, I take walks everyday (to the park near my place).

  • My interest in walking hasn't changed over the years.
  • I don’t change my walking routine/habit (over the years)

Now, although I don’t have much time for walking/this activity, I still try to spend time on it because I know it is good for me/my health.

So, this is why I still take walks now.

scripts.name: _Weather
scripts.html:
• 1 - Tell me about the weather at where you live. What is the weather like in each season? Which season do you personally like?

    I live in Hanoi

There are 4 seasons here: spring, summer, autumn, and winter.

In spring, it is usually rainy and humid.

Summer is my favorite season. It is hot but I love sunshine, and it is a perfect time for a family vacation at a beach.

Autumn lasts from August to October. It is often windy and stormy.

The last season of the year is winter. In this period, the weather is usually freezing.

So, I think I like summer the most.

  • 2 - How is the weather today at where you are? Is it cold, is it warm?

Talk about today's weather in detail.

Now = currently , it is summer in Hanoi.

Today’s weather is very nice. The temperature is about 25 degrees celsius, so it's not too hot / very comfortable.

Plus, it is sunny and windy. So, I think it is perfect for outdoor activities such as going to the park, playing football or going swimming.

According to the weather forecast, it is going to rain at night.

So, this is about the weather today.

5 - How has the weather in your country changed over the years? What was the weather like when you were a child? How was it different from what it is now?

When I was a kid, the summer used to be more pleasant.

The temperature was about 25 degrees celsius. So, I could do many outdoor activities. I used to go fishing with my brother and play football with my friends on summer days.

However, it is extremely = scorching hot in summer nowadays. The temperature is about 35 degrees celsius and everyone wants to stay inside to avoid the heat.

I think it is because of global warming.

So, it is the biggest difference.

6 - Severe weather conditions can do a lot of damage. Tell me about an experience you hao related to severe weather conditions. Perhaps a city was flooded, or maybe businesses or schools were closed due to heavy snow. What was the problem? How did people deal with the situation?

I remember a serious flood happened during our trip to ….. with my family last ….

There were strong winds and heavy rainfall. There were floods all over the place.

Many houses and cars went underwater.

It was very dangerous, so many famous tourist attractions had to close for days.

Transportation had to be shut down.

We had to stay inside the hotel and store our food for days.

I was very disappointed because we couldn’t go to many interesting places/ missed out on many things.

The worst thing is that our return flight was canceled due to = because of the bad weather, so we had to stay there 2 more days.

So, this was a serious weather condition I remember.

scripts.name: Work
scripts.html:
• 1 - You indicated that you work. I would like to know about your company. What kind of company is it? When was it founded? Where is it located? What products or services does it offer?

I work for a large electronics company.

I have worked here for 7 years now.

Our company is a global company that produces smartphones and modern home appliances.

Our company was founded in the late 1960s. At first, it was a small company, but now it is one of the largest technology companies in the world.

Our company headquarters is located in Seoul, Korea.

So, these are some details about the company I work for.

2 - Tell me about your daily routine at work. What kind of work do you engage in on a normal workday? What do you typically do as soon as you arrive at the office? Tell me everything about your day at work.

I currently work in the sales department.

I usually start my work at 8 in the morning.

First, I have a small meeting with my boss and colleagues to discuss some work issues and ideas.

Then I go back to my office and do my job until noon.

I have lunch at the canteen and get some coffee at the coffee shop.

I get back to work at 1pm. I usually have some meetings with customers about the products and prices.

I finish my work at 5pm every day.

So, these are the things I do at work.

  • 3 - Now, tell me about a project you did at work last week. What kind of project was it? How did it go? What did you have to do for the project? Did you have any meetings to attend for the project?

I had a busy =hectic work schedule last week.

I had a project called “Happy customers return”.

There were lots of things to take care of.

First, I had to make phone calls to many customers.

Plus, I had to attend long meetings.

Also, I had to send reports to my supervisor every day.

I felt tired at the end of the week. However, I was so happy because the project was a big success.

So, this is what I did at work last week.

scripts.name: Vacations at home
scripts.html:
• 1 - You indicated that you take vacations at home. Who are the people you would like to see and spend time with on your vacation?

    I am usually busy at work. So when I am on my vacation, I want to spend time with my family.

During my vacation at home, we do many things together.

We often go camping in the park near my house. It has a camping ground with a great view.

We sometimes stay home and watch some comedies. I feel very relaxed and comfortable when I am at home with my family.

We also go to a restaurant in our neighborhood. We talk about things in our lives while enjoying the food.

So, this is how I spent my vacation at home with my family.

  • 2 - Describe exactly what you did during the last vacation that you spent at home. Give me a description of what you did from the first to the last day. Talk about all the people you saw and everything that you did.

I remember going to a football match with my friends when I was on vacation.

We went to see our favorite team playing in the final round. There were a lot of people at the stadium and everybody was excited to watch the game.

We bought tickets and beer, then we sat down to enjoy the game.

We were very thrilled that our team won, so we had a great time celebrating our victory.

Then, we went home and had a meal together.

So, this is what I did during my vacation at home.

  • 3 - Could you tell me about an unusual or unexpected experience you had during a vacation you had at home? What happened? Who was involved? And why was this experience so memorable?

    I remember being injured during my vacation at home.

I was playing football with my brothers in the garden. I was running so fast to catch the ball when I tripped over a stone and hurt my knees.

My mother performed first aid on me and gave me some pain killers.

I had to stay inside and get a lot of rest.

Since then, I try to be more careful when I'm playing football.

scripts.name: Domestic trips
scripts.html:
1 - You indicated in the survey that you like to travel domestically. Tell me about some of the places you like to travel to and why you like going there? (1 minute)

Vietnam has a tropical climate and is famous for its beautiful landscapes, like the mountains in the north and the white sand beaches in the south. Popular places like Ha Long Bay, Sapa, and Danang attract many tourists.

I really like Ha Long Bay because it has many islands and caves. Sapa is famous for Fansipan mountain, and the weather there is nice all year. Danang is known for its sandy beaches.

These places can get very crowded during the busy season, but Ha Long Bay and Sapa are still my favorite spots to visit.

(Having a tropical climate,) Vietnam is well-known/famous for breathtaking/beautiful scenery such as hills, mountains ⛰️ in the north, and white sand beaches 🏖️ in the south. (It has a long coastline so tourism is a rising industry.) Sapa, Ha Long Bay or Danang are famous tourist destinations (which attract many foreign tourists).

- I like Ha Long Bay because it is very beautiful/scenic. It is famous for many natural caves and small islands.

- Next, Sapa is famous for the Fansipan mountain. There are many clouds ☁️ and the weather is very nice all year.

- Danang is famous for beautiful sandy beaches.

It gets/is extremely/really crowded during the peak season.

So, Ha Long Bay and Sapa are the places I like to visit.

- Tả biển

I'm definitely a beach person. And luckily, Vietnam has a lot of beaches. I go to the beach every summer. My friends and I often go to Son Tra beach. It is located in Danang, a beautiful central city of Vietnam . This sandy beach with crystal clear water attracts thousands of visitors. My family and I relax on the beach and swim all day, then we go out to eat delicious seafood at a beachside restaurant and enjoy the sunset. But, Son Tra has become really popular these days, so it can be too crowded. That's one downside, I guess. Anyway, it's still my favorite place to go in the summer.

2 - Can you tell me about the things you do in order to prepare for trips? (1 minute)

I don’t prepare much before traveling. I’m a light packer. 🎒

I have a travel packing checklist to make sure I don’t forget anything ✅

👚 First, I pack my clothes / suitable clothes for the weather.

  • If I go to the beach, I make sure to pack my swimsuit 👙 and my sunglasses 😎.
  • If I go to some cold areas/places ❄️, I always bring my warm clothes.

Second, I bring some snacks (such as instant noodles 🍜).

Third, I bring some (emergency) medicine 💊 (just in case).

Finally, I bring my wallet and phone.

I put all of them in a small suitcase 💼.

  • I make a list of the places I go to. I go online to check the reviews (of these places). 🌟🌟🌟
  • Plus, I check the weather forecast 🌧️.

3 - Traveling can lead to many kinds of interesting, funny and unexpected experiences.

Tell me about one travel experience you had that was unforgettable.

Start by telling me when this happened, where you were, and who you were with.

And then, tell me about all the things that happened that made this experience so unforgettable. (2 minutes)

**Mất ví:**

I remember losing my wallet when I traveled to Danang with my family/friend … recently

When I arrived at the airport, my wallet was still in my bag.

Then, we took a taxi to the hotel

I found out I lost my wallet when we checked in at the hotel.

It took me a few hours to look for it, but it was nowhere to be found / but I couldn’t find it. I was so frustrated I was very nervous and confused because I kept all of my cards and my ID inside the wallet.

In the end, my wife/friend had to pay for the (whole) trip.

It was a nice trip because of the delicious food and the beautiful landscape, but it could have been a wonderful experience if I had not lost my wallet.

Since then, I have tried to be more careful when traveling.

**Đau bụng:**

I remember eating something wrong during a trip.

We went to a local seafood restaurant, which was widely known for having fresh and excellent quality seafood.

At first, I enjoyed the food so much, it tasted amazing.

Suddenly, I felt uncomfortable, I think I ate something that went bad/ I was allergic to.

(I got food poisoning/ allergy and it was pretty bad.)

My stomach was upset.

- I had a fever and I felt light-headed/very bad.

I started vomiting and stayed in the bathroom for an hour.

My mother went to the drug store and got some medicine.

I took some medicine to get better.

I had to stay inside and **get a lot of rest.**

Since then, I have tried to be more careful (when I'm eating something) while traveling.

6 - Tell me about some of the trips that you took in your youth.

Where did you go? Who did you go with?

And what did you do or see during those early trips? (2 minutes)

I remember going to the beach for a vacation with my family when I was a kid.

We went to the beach on Phu Quoc island.

We stayed at a beachside hotel. This place had a great ocean view. We stayed there for three days.

In the morning, my family and I got up early and we went to the beach to enjoy the sunrise. I loved the fresh ocean air and the sound of waves crashing on the beach.

During the day we swam in the ocean and played with the sand on the beach. We also took a lot of pictures (and posted them up online on the spot.)

In the evening, we went out for some seafood. We ate some raw fish and shellfish. The food tasted extra good because i was starving/ we ate right in front of the beach at night.

After having dinner We took walks along the beach (and played with some firecrackers.)

Overall, I really enjoyed / enjoyed every minute of that vacation at the beach.

scripts.name: BEACHES
scripts.html:
BEACHES

Q1: You indicated that you like to go to the beach. Which beach do you like to go to? Where is it? What does it look like? How often do you go to this beach? How do people get there? Does it get crowded? (link)

Vietnam has many beautiful beaches and my favorite beach is My Khe.

It is one of the most famous beaches in Vietnam.

It has beautiful coastlines with clear water.

I went there for a vacation with my family last year.

People do many things there. They often play volleyball, build sandcastles on the beach, and swim in the sea.

So, these are the things about my favorite beach.

Q2: When do you go to the beach? What do you usually do there? Who do you go with? Tell me everything about the activities you do at the beach. (link)

I often go to the beach with my family every summer.

In the morning, I get up early and go to the beach to enjoy the sunrise and the beautiful ocean view. I like the fresh ocean air and the sound of wave crashing on the beach.

Then, I like to swim in the ocean or play volleyball on the beach.

In the evening, we go out for some seafood. After dinner, we take walks along the beach and enjoy the fresh air.

Sometimes, we sit on the beach and drink coconut water. It is very refreshing.

So these are the things I do when I’m at the beach.

Q3: Tell me about a particular memorable or beautiful beach that you visited. What did this first place look like? What was your impression of that place? (Không có file nghe)

I'm definitely a beach person

And luckily, Vietnam has a lot of beaches.

The most memorable beach that I have visited is Sam Son. I first went there when I was a kid and we were on a family trip.

When we reached the beach, I was amazed by the beautiful coastline and crystal clear water. Surprisingly, there were not many people at the beach, so we had a great time swimming in the sea and playing with the sand. It was quiet and chill, which made our experience even better because I don’t like places packed with people.

One thing I remember the most about Sam son beach is that I could see a lot of small fish when I was swimming, which was amazing.

So, Sam Son beach is my favorite place to visit.

Q4: Tell me about a particularly memorable trip to the beach. Who are you with? Which beach were you at? What did you do there? What made this trip to the beach more memorable or special? Tell me everything you did from the moment you arrived there (link)

Sample 1:

I remember going to the beach for a vacation with my family last year

We went to the beach on Phu Quoc island.

We stayed at a beachside hotel. This place had a great ocean view. We stayed there for three days.

In the morning, my family and I got up early and we went to the beach to enjoy the sunrise and beautiful ocean view. I loved the fresh ocean air and the sound of waves crashing on the beach.

During the day we swam in the ocean and played with the sand on the beach. We also took a lot of pictures (and posted them up online on the spot.)

In the evening, we went out for some seafood. We ate some raw fish and shellfish. The food tasted extra good because i was starving/ we ate right in front of the beach at night.

After having dinner We took walks along the beach, something we sat down on the beachside and drank coconut water. (and played with some firecrackers.)

So, it was a memorable trip to the beach I remember.

Sample 2:

I remember going to the beach for a vacation with my family two years ago.

We went to the My Khe beach.

We stayed at a beachside hotel with a great ocean view.

In the evening we ate some seafood. It was so fresh and delicious.

Đau bụng

scripts.name: family & friend (1)
scripts.html:
1.Describe a family member or friend you have what is he or she like what is special about that person?

Let me tell you about my parents.

My mom and dad are similar in some ways.

First my parents are very family-oriented. They like to have family gathering.

Plus they're both very active. They like to go to hiking or go on trips.

On the other hand my mom and dad are different in some ways. My mom likes animals, but my dad does not.

So this is what my mom and dad are like.

2. Tell me about what you commonly do with your friends or family members when you get together with them?

I often go to bars for social gatherings.

I grab some drinks with my friends .

Drinks break the ice and spice up the mood. I sometimes do several rounds.

Plus I sometimes go to bars for special occasions such as birthday parties, lunar year party.

So I usually go to bars to hang out with my friends.

3. Talk about what you did with your family members or friends recently. Tell me about them?

I remember watching a movie with my family recently.

Before watching the movie. We got some popcorn. We also got some nachos and soft drinks.

The movie was amazing and we had a great time

After watching the movie. We went to a decent Korean restaurant. They had the best Korean food in town. The food tasted so good because i was starving. The beef i order was so juicy and tender.

Plus we had some drinks while we ate.

We ordered some beer, it went well with the food.

It was a very enjoyable dinner.

8. Talk about a visit to a friend or a family member from your childhood? who did you visit and whom did you go with? What do you remember about that visit? What made the visit special?

I remember going to my grandma’s house when i was a kid.

We had dinner together. However, i think i ate too fast. I got indigestion and it was pretty bad. My stopmach was upset. I had a fever and i felt light-headed.

I took some medicine to get better. I had to stay inside and get a lot of rest.

Since then, i try to be more careful when I'm eating something.

6, 9. Talk about a time when you visited a friend or a family member recently. What did you do when you visited them? What was memorable about that visit? Tell me everything from beginning to end?

I remember going to my friend’s house last week.

We had dinner together and had some drinks.

However, we ended up drinking quite a lot that day. I got very drunk because I drank too much. My stomach was upset. I felt dizzy and I could not walk straight.

I had a hangover the next day.

It took me quite a while to sober up.

Since then, I try to be more careful when I’m drinking

scripts.name: Housing
scripts.html:
Topic: Housing

❓1 - I would like to know where you live. Can you describe your home to me? What does it look like? How many rooms does it have? 1 minute

Sample:

I have lived in an apartment/flat/house with my family for three years.

It’s a small apartment/flat/house in Hanoi.

There are three bedrooms, a living room and a kitchen.

Plus, there are two bathrooms

  • In the living room, (there is some furniture and home appliances.) First, there is a sofa, a tea table, a cabinet, and a mirror. Also, there is a TV, an AC, and a speaker.

    The living room is next to/connected to the kitchen.
  • In the kitchen, there is a sink, a dining table and some cabinets 🗄️. Plus, there is a fridge, a microwave and a gas stove. Also, there is a rice cooker 🍚 and some pots and pans 🫕.
  • So, this is what my place looks like.
  • So, these are the things in my house.

I love living in my apartment/flat/house.

❓2 - What is your normal routine at home? Do you do housework every day? What do you usually do on weekdays and what do you do on weekends? 1 minute

Sample:

👉🏻 I’m very busy with work so I only do the housework on the weekend.

On weekdays, I only:

  • make my bed, have breakfast, and go to work
  • I also wash/do the dishes after dinner and take out the trash 🗑️ after that.

However, I deep clean my house on weekends.

  • I do the laundry (using my washing machine) 👗 and fold my clothes 🧦
  • I also clean the house:
    • First, I sweep and mop the floor 🧹
    • I dust/clean the furniture 💨
  • I water the plants 🌿 and feed my dog 🐈
  • Finally, I clean the bathroom and the toilet 🚽

So these are things I normally do on weekdays and weekends.

❓3 - Describe the home you lived in as a child. How was it different from the home you live in now? 1m30s

Sample:

👉🏻 I remember living in a house when I was a kid.

It was a small house with 3 bedrooms and a big kitchen.

There was also a small garden/a backyard, I used to play there all the time with my brother. We had a lot of good memories here.

But now,

I live in a big apartment. There are 4 bedrooms and a big living room.

It’s much bigger and more convenient.

It is equipped with/It has modern home appliances, such as an AC, a microwave and a fridge.

However, it doesn’t have a garden/yard, so I have to go to the gym in my neighborhood/nearby to get some exercise/workout.

  • So, these are the things about my childhood house and my house now.
  • So, these are the biggest differences.

❓4 - I would like to know where you live. Talk about the different rooms in your home. Tell me about your favorite room in your home. What does it look like? 1 minute

Sample:

👉🏻 I have lived in an apartment/flat/house with my family for three years.

It’s a small apartment/flat/house in Hanoi.

There are three bedrooms, a living room and a kitchen.

I think my favorite room at home is my bedroom.

In my bedroom, there is a bed, a dresser, a small table/bedside table, and a lamp.

  • The bed is very comfortable/comfy. I always feel relaxed when I’m on my bed 🛏️.
  • My workspace is also in the bedroom. There is a computer, a desk, and a chair. 🖥️🪑. Besides working, I also (use the computer to) surf the Internet and watch movies here.

I think my bedroom is the best place / a perfect place for me to relax. I feel free to do whatever I like.

So, my favorite room in the house is the bedroom.

❓5 - What kinds of things do you do to keep your house clean and comfortable? What kinds of housework do you do at home? 1 minute

There are many things I do to keep my house clean and tidy.

I am busy on weekdays, so I can only do some simple chores, such as:

  • Vacuum my room
  • Make my bed
  • I also wash the dishes after dinner and take out the trash 🗑️ after that.

However, I deep clean my house on weekends.

  • I do the laundry (using my washing machine) 👗 and fold my clothes 🧦
  • I also clean the house:
    • First, I sweep and mop the floor 🧹
    • I dust/clean the furniture 💨
  • I water the plants 🌿 and feed my dog 🐈
  • Finally, I clean the bathroom and the toilet 🚽

So, these are the things I do to keep my house clean and tidy.

❓6 - Sometimes we want to change something to our homes, maybe get new furniture or do some painting or decorating. Tell me about one change that you made in your home. Tell me why you decided to go to make that change and everything that you had to do to make that change happen. 2 minutes

(1 thay đổi trong nhà)

Sample 1: Sơn tường: 🎨 🧱

👉🏻 I remember repainting my room last year.

Back then, My room / The walls in my room looked really old. It was gray, dark and dirty.

First, I went to a paint store and chose/picked/selected the colorI wanted . I picked the bright pink color/navy blue color. I also bought a brush

After that, I went home and painted all my room. I spent a day doing it. It was hard work but the result was beyond my expectations.

(I was surprised because) my room looked brand new/great.

So, this was the change I made in my house.

---

Sample 2: Mua giường mới 🛏️

I remember buying a new bed for my bedroom.

As I got older, I grew in height. So the old bed was too small for me.

My parents decided to buy a new bed for me.

- First, we went to the furniture store 🛋️

- Then, the staff showed me many beds that they had (there/in the showroom).

- After looking at many beds, I decided/picked/selected a big brown bed 🛏️

- They had a discount, so we could save some money 💰

The bed was very comfortable. It looked good/very nice in my room.

I liked the way it blended perfectly and naturally with other furniture/items in my room.

I liked lying on my new bed and relaxed.

So, this was the change I made in my house.

❓7 - There are always problems that happen in any home Things break, projects do not go as planned or people you live with do not cooperate. Tell me about some problems or issues that happened at your home 1m30s

Sample:

👉🏻 I remember when my TV broke down/was broken.

The screen (suddenly) shut down when I was watching a movie with my family.

I had it fixed. / I called a technician to fix the problem.

It cost me a lot/It was expensive. I was really upset.

Plus, I remember receiving the wrong furniture at home.

I ordered a big bed but the furniture store shipped a small bed for kids.

I was mad about it/ was unhappy with it. I had to go back to the store to get an exchange.

So, these are the problems I had at home.

❓8 - Pick one of those problems and explain everything that happened. When did it happen and what caused the problem. Explain in detail everything you did to resolve the situation. 2 minutes

Sample:

👉🏻 As I mentioned, I remember receiving the wrong bed last week .

I ordered a big double bed but the furniture store shipped a small single bed for kids.

It did not fit me (at all). I was disappointed with the poor service.

I called the store to get an exchange.

They agreed to give me a new bed. However, they said it could take a week for the bed to come.

I had to sleep on that small bed. It was very uncomfortable. I was mad about/unhappy with it. I decided to file a complaint about the inconvenience I had.

So, this was a problem I had at home.

❓9. You and your family probably have different responsibilities at home. Tell me about which chores each family member is reponsible for. 1 minute

Each member in my family has different responsibilities.

My family consists of 4 members there are 4 people in my family: my wife, my two children and me.

My wife cooks all the meals in my family and does the housework.

I am responsible for washing dishes.

I am also the breadwinner of my family.

Our kids are small but they sometimes help with the housework when they have free time.

We take care of our kids together.

So, these are the responsibilities of every member in my family.

scripts.name: Furniture
scripts.html:
1 - Tell me about the furniture you have in your home

Is there a piece of furniture that is your favorite?

There are many types of furniture in my apartment.

In the living room, there is a sofa, a tea table and a cabinet.

In my bedroom, I have a bed, a desk, and a wardrobe.

I think my favorite furniture is my bed because I love to sleep.

It is a very comfy and cozy bed.

I feel relaxed and comfortable when I lie down on my bed.

So, these are some pieces of furniture I have at home.

2 - Tell me about how you use your furniture on a typical day

What kinds of things do you do with your furniture?

I use the sofa in the living room all the time.

I sit on it when I am watching TV or playing games

I sometimes lie down on it to take a nap.

I use my bed in my room every single day.

I lie down on my bed to relax and recharge my battery.

My bed is very comfy, so it helps me sleep well.

So, these are things I do with my furniture.

3 - Tell me about the furniture that you had at home when you were a child

Was there anything different from the furniture that you use today?

When I was a kid, the furniture I had was a lot smaller.

For example, my bed was a single bed for children.

The one I use now is a queen-sized bed for adults.

Next, my furniture used to be light blue.

My desk was light blue when I was a kid.

The one I use now is dark brown.

Moreover, the material of my furniture used to be quite different.

My childhood chair was made of plastic.

Now I am using a wooden chair.

So, the size, color and material of the furniture are the biggest differences.

6 - Tell me about a time when you had a problem with your furniture

Perhaps, it could have gotten damaged for some reason

Tell me exactly what happened and how you solved the problem.

I remember when a table in my room was broken.

My father bought this table for me on my 10th birthday. So, it was too old and its legs were getting weak.

One day, I put my bag on the table and one of the legs broke off.

All of my books fell on the floor.

I tried to get it fixed but it was impossible to fix it.

I was pretty sad because this table was a gift from my father and it held a lot of good memories from my childhood. Then, I decided to buy a new one.

So, this was a problem I had with my furniture.

scripts.name: Home appliances
scripts.html:
1. Describe home appliances.

I have many kinds of home appliances in my house.

One of them is an AC, which is indispensable to me during summer time.

Nowadays, summer is getting hotter and my AC helps cool the air and improve the air quality in my house.

Other than that= Besides, a washing machine is very important to me because it saves my time and energy when I do my laundry.

So, these are the appliances I have in my house.

  1. How to use (operate) a home appliance

I use my TV to watch news and movies every day.

My TV is modern but very easy to use.

First, I use the remote control to turn on the TV.

Second, I press the home button to choose = select an application I want.

Finally, I select the channel I like to watch and enjoy the program.

When I watch TV alone, I set the high volume to get the best experience.

So, these are the things I do when I use my TV

  1. Experience/ bought/ a home appliance.

I remember buying a new TV for my living room last week.

I went to a department store in the downtown area because they had a big sale for their home appliances.

I wanted to buy a new smart TV and I decided to get a 55 inch Samsung smart TV.

I got it delivered to my house and the staff helped set up the TV for me.

I was very excited to watch movies on the new TV because it had a high resolution quality. It also looked very nice in my living room.

So, it was a memorable experience I had when I bought a new TV.

scripts.name: Internet
scripts.html:
• 1 - What do people normally do on the internet? Do they play games, watch television, or watch movies? Talk about all the things people do online

    People do many things on the internet these days (nowadays).

First, they send emails or check messages.

Second, they post things on social media quite often.

Plus, they play online games or watch video clips.

Also, they shop online or do online banking.

Finally, people read news online and have online meetings most of the time.

So, these are the things people do on the internet.

  • 2 - What do you usually do on the internet? Do you like to shop online? Do you like sharing Videos with other people? Tell me about everything that you do online.

    I do various types of things online these days.

I usually use my smartphone to access the internet. So, I can surf the internet whenever I want to.

First, I do online searches or read news articles.

  • shop online or update the latest trends.

First, I chat with people on messaging apps. I often leave comments on people's postings.

  • have a chat with my friends on Facebook/ Twitter/…

Second, I listen to music or watch movies online.

  • I usually send good songs or funny videos to my friends.

Plus, i shop online or do online banking.

Also, i read news online and have online meetings most of the time.

Plus, I check the weather forecast.

Finally, I make payment online. And I do online banking.

So. These are the things I do on the internet.

  • 3 - Tell me about your early experience of surfing the internet. What do you remember particularly about that experience?

Sample 1:

Back in the day, internet connection was quite slow. It took me a long time to log on to websites.

Plus, I used to get access to the internet on my computer.

But now, the internet has become a lot faster than in the past. With wifi being everywhere, I can go online and be connected to the world wherever I am. It takes much less time to log on to websites.

Also, I can surf the internet on the go by my smartphone now.

I can get access to = access the internet on the go.

So, internet surfing has become a lot easier thanks to smartphones and wifi.

Sample 2:

When I was a kid, my neighborhood didn’t have access to the internet.

I had to use computers in my school to log on to websites.

Plus, I had to wait for my turn to use the computers and I could only use them for a limited time. It was very inconvenient.

But now, the internet is everywhere.

I can access the internet whenever I want and wherever I go.

I can use my phone to surf the internet on the go.

So, people can get access to the internet easily nowadays

  • 4 - I’m sure you have things that you remember seeing on the internet. Talk about a memorable posting that you saw on the internet. Why was it memorable for you?

    I remember seeing a posting about a talented girl on Facebook

She was only 10 years old. Her family was poor but she loved singing. So, she became the winner in a singing competition.

The story about her dream was really inspiring. She made me believe that good things will come if we try.

I watched her performances online and I really liked her beautiful voice.

So, it was a memorable posting I saw on the internet.

scripts.name: Phones and Technology
scripts.html:
Phones:

1 - What do you like most about your phone?

Maybe you like the camera or maybe you like certain applications. Tell me why you like those features.

The thing I like the most about my phone is its design.

It is just about my hand size so it fits perfectly in my pocket.

Plus, it is very lightweight so it is easy to carry.

Moreover, my phone has both front and back cameras. So I can take many selfies.

The back camera helps me take high quality photos, I can capture beautiful moments and share them with my family and friends.

So, these are some features that I like about my phone.

2 - Tell me about the first phone you used. How was It different from the phone you use now?

My first cell phone was a simple phone. I was able to just make phone calls and send text messages, but that was it.

However, phones have changed a lot over the years. They have become a lot better than in the past.

I can do a lot more on my phone now. I can get access to the internet whenever I want to.

So, smartphones have made a big difference in our lives.

3 - Tell me about a time when you had trouble while using your phone. What was the problem and how did you deal with it?

I use my phone throughout the day, so it runs out of battery quite often.

Once, my phone died when I was outside. It was very inconvenient because my phone was dead.

  • I had to call someone, but I could NOT.
  • I had to check some messages, but could NOT.

So, I went to a coffee shop to get my phone charged.

Since then, I always carry around my charger.

+I always carry around my battery pack.

5 - What do you do on your phone besides talking to people over the phone? Do you make updates on your social media page? Do you play games? Tell me what you typically do on our phone.

I use my phone to do many things besides making phone calls.

I usually use my smartphone to get access to the internet. So, I can surf the internet whenever I want to.

First, I chat with people on messaging apps. I often leave comments on people's postings.

  • have a chat with my friends on Facebook/ Twitter/…

Second, I listen to music or watch movies online.

  • I usually send good songs or funny videos to my friends.

Plus, i shop online or do online banking.

Also, i read news online and check weather forecast.

So, these are the things I do on my phone.

Technology:

1. What kinds of technology do people typically use in your country?Do people use computers, cell phones or handheld devices? What are some common forms of technology that people use?

People in Vietnam use cell phones most often.

First, they send messages or make phone calls every day.

Second, they use cell phones to access the internet.

On other hand, they use laptops at work most of the time.

They do some projects on their laptops. It helps them to work more effectively.

They also use laptops to have online meetings.
So, these are some common devices that people use in my country.

2. What piece of technology do you use most often? Do you use computers or mobile phones? Tell me about the most typical type of technology you use everyday.

I use my smartphone all the time and I do many things on my phone.

I usually use my smartphone to access the internet. So, I can surf the internet whenever I want to.

First, I send messages or make phone calls every day.

Second, I chat with people on messaging apps.

  • have a chat with my friends on Facebook/ Twitter/…

Plus, I listen to music or watch movies on my phone.

  • I usually send good songs or funny videos to my friends.

Also, I check the weather forecast. I leave comments on people's postings.

Finally, I make payment online. And I do online banking.

So. These are the things I do on my phone.

3. Technology has definitely changed over time. Tell me about an early memory that you have about the piece of technology. It could be a computer or more by phone from many years ago. How has that technology changed over time?

I remember the first phone I had 10 years ago.

My first cell phone was a simple phone.

I was able to just make phone calls and send text messages, but that was it.

However, phones have changed a lot over the years.

They have become a lot better than in the past.

I can do a lot more on my phone now.

I can get access to the internet whenever I want to.

So, cell phones have developed so much over time.

4. Problems often come up because of our dependence on technology. Think about a time when you experienced a problem because some piece of technology was not working properly. Maybe your computer crashed or maybe your cell phone has no service. Tell me about a time when you had some kind of problem getting the technology to work.

I use my phone throughout the day, so it runs out of battery quite often.

Once, my phone died when I was outside. It was very inconvenient because my phone was dead.

I had to call someone, but I could NOT.

I had to check some messages, but could NOT.

So, I went to a coffee shop to get my phone charged.

Since then, I always carry around my charger.

+I always carry around my battery pack.

scripts.name: Shopping
scripts.html:
• 1 - You indicated in the survey that you like to go shopping. Talk about stores or shopping centers in your country. What are they like? Describe them in detail

    There are many shopping centers in Vietnam

They are mostly in big cities these days.

One of the biggest shopping centers is the Lotte mall.

There are a lot of stores at these places, such as clothes stores, jewelry stores, supermarkets. You can get discounts while buying high quality products there.

Plus, there are many restaurants at malls. So, you can enjoy delicious meals there.

Once again, people go to Lotte malls to shop.

  • 2 - Where do you go when you go shopping for something? What do you buy when you go there? What is special about that place?

    I go to many places to shop such as shopping malls or department stores.

However, I also like to shop online.

Online shopping is very convenient in many ways. It saves my time and energy to buy things.

Shopping has become a lot easier than in the past.

Also, there are a lot of options to choose from and I can get discounts.

I buy things such as clothes or tickets on the internet most often.

So, I really enjoy shopping online.

  • 3 - Think of your early memories of shopping. Was there a store you remember from your childhood? What did it look like and what were your Impressions of that place?

    I remember getting groceries with my family when I was a kid.

We went to a local supermarket near our house.

It was very big and they had good prices and good-quality goods.

So, we used to buy many things and get some discounts.

I liked the salesperson there because she always gave me candies when we checked out.

I was very excited whenever I went there.

So, this was my early memory of shopping.

  • 4 - You indicated in the survey that you want to go shopping. Let's talk about your shopping habits. How often do you go shopping? Where do you go for your shopping?

I am usually busy during weekdays, so I often go shopping with my family on weekends.

We go to a supermarket near our house to buy groceries and food.

First, we go to the food section to get some pork and beef.

Second , we get some fruits and vegetables.

Finally, we often buy some toilet paper and shampoo.

So, these are things I do when I go shopping.

  • 5 - When was the last time you went to shop for something? Where did you go and what did you buy? Who did you go with? What was special about that shopping experience?

I remember going shopping with my family last week.

We went to the Lotte Department store downtown to buy new clothes.

There were many pretty shirts and trousers on sale, so I could save a lot of money.

The salesperson there was very nice. She helped us choose the size and the color.

However, there were a lot of people at the clothes store. I had to wait for a long time to check out.

So, I think it was a special shopping experience.


  • 6 - People sometimes go through difficulties while they are shopping. What were some problems you had to deal with while you were shopping?

    I remember shopping for some shoes recently.

I found out about a nice pair of running shoes on the internet, and I went to a shoe store to get them.

When I got to/ arrived at the store, I told the salesperson the shoes I wanted.

However, the store did NOT have my size in stock. They were sold-out.

I could NOT get the shoes I wanted. I had to get them online later on.

So, this was the last time I bought new shoes.

scripts.name: Fashion
scripts.html:
• 1 - What kinds of clothes do people in your country typically wear? Do they wear different clothes for work or for play?

    I think Vietnamese fashion styles are seasonal.

Vietnam has four distinct seasons: spring, summer, autumn (fall) and winter, so people wear different clothes for each season.

They often wear jackets in spring.

In summer, they usually wear T-shirts and jeans.

They wear sweaters/pullovers/ jumpers in autumn.

In winter, they wear coats and scarves/ gloves.

They usually dress smartly at work. They wear suits and ties to look professional.

So, I think Vietnamese are very fashionable.

  • 2 - What kinds of clothes do you like to wear personally? What kind of fashion style do you like? What are you wearing today?

I don't have an exact fashion style.

My fashion style depends on my purposes.

I usually wear sports clothes when I go for a run.

I often wear T-shirts and jeans when I hang out with my friends.

When I am at work, I wear suits, shirts and trousers.

When I am at home, I just wear whatever makes me feel comfortable.

So, I wear different clothes for different purposes.

  • 3 - Fashion styles are always changing. Tell me about the kinds of clothes that were popular when you were younger. How are they different from what is popular now?

    When I was a kid, people didn't care much about fashion.

They used to wear sandals because they were convenient.

But now, they love to update the latest trends.

People see new fashion trends on the internet, social media,...

They want to look nice when they go out, so they wear high heels or shoes instead of sandals.

So, that's the difference between fashion trends in the past and now.

  • 6 - Tell me about the last time you bought a new piece of clothing. What did you need and where did you find it? Were there any challenges or problems? Give me all the details of the story

    I remember shopping for some shoes recently.

I found out about a nice pair of running shoes on the internet, and I went to a shoe store to get them.

When I got to/ arrived at the store, I told the salesperson the shoes I wanted.

However, the store did NOT have my size in stock. They were sold-out.

I could NOT get the shoes I wanted. I had to get them online later on.
So, this was the last time I bought new shoes.

scripts.name: Food
scripts.html:
Topic: Food

Vocabulary

vegetables: rau = veggies

fruit: hoa quả

juice: nước hoa quả

vitamin and fiber: vitamin và chất xơ

Boost our immune system: tăng sức đề kháng

organic food: thực phẩm hữu cơ

chicken breast: ức gà

protein (prou tin)

eat healthily: ăn uống lành mạnh

healthy food >< junk food ~ fast food (đồ ăn nhanh)

snacks: đồ ăn vặt

Breakfast / lunch / dinner / light meal ~ snack

healthy = good for our health

unhealthy = bad for our health

rich in...: giàu (chất..)

digestion: sự tiêu hoá

cannot live without: không thể sống thiếu

build muscles: xây cơ 💪

chemicals: hoá chất (k…)

overweight: thừa cân

all the time: suốt

made me: (đã) bắt tôi làm gì

dish: món ăn

herbs: rau sống

eat = have

For breakfast / lunch / dinner : cho bữa …

In the morning / afternoon / evening…: vào buổi …

Every morning / afternoon / evening: mỗi buổi …

eat out: ăn ở ngoài

hot pot: lẩu

Taste: vị

a unique taste: hương vị đặc trưng

bone: xương. 🦴

spices: gia vị 🧂 (khác spicy 🌶️)

It takes a lot of time: tốn rất nhiều thời gian

Soup (nước canh, nước dùng) → broth: nước hầm xương 🍲🦴

went bad: đã bị hỏng, ôi thiu 🤮

Dressing: sốt salad

Vegan / vegetarian: người ăn chay

?1 - What is a popular dish in your country? What's special about the dish? Please describe that dish In detail.

(Tả món ăn nước bạn)

Sample:

Pho is a popular dish in Vietnam (and over the world).

It has a unique taste.

  • 🦴 The broth has beef bones and many (kinds of) spices.
    It takes a lot of time to cook it.
  • 🍜 The noodle (is made of rice and) is really delicious.
  • 🥩 The beef is thin and tender.
  • 🍋 We eat Pho with (lime and) vegetables/herbs

I like it because:

  • It is a healthy dish. / It is healthy.
  • Also, it is very cheap in Vietnam.
  • (and I think I can eat Pho every day.)

So, Pho is a popular dish in our country.

?2 - What do you eat on a regular day? Tell me everything that you eat in detail.

(Ăn gì hằng ngày)

Sample:

My meals are the same every day.

  • First, I eat bread and egg in the morning (for breakfast).
  • I have rice with chicken for lunch. I also have (some) vegetables.
  • I eat fruits or order some juice in the afternoon.
  • (Sometimes I eat nuts 🥜 for my snacks.)
  • For dinner, I have beef with some rice.
  • I drink milk before going to bed.

I try to eat healthy every day / whenever I can.

So, these are the things that I normally eat. / So, these are the foods I eat on a regular day.

?3 - Tell me about a memorable experience you had while eating something. It could be good or bad. What happened? Why was it so memorable or special? Tell me everything with lots of details.

Sample:

I remember eating something wrong at home last year.

I think I ate something that went bad.

(I got food poisoning and it was pretty bad.)

My stomach was upset.

  • I had a fever and I felt light-headed/very bad.

I went to the drug store and got some medicine.

I took some medicine to get better.

I had to stay inside and get a lot of rest.

Since then, I have tried to be more careful when I'm eating something.

❓ 4 - When was the last time you had some healthy food? Who was it with and how did you feel? What was special about that experience?

(Lần cuối ăn lành mạnh)

Sample:

I remember eating a healthy meal with my family last week.

We usually eat salad at restaurants. However, that day, we made this dish at home.

  • First, we bought the vegetables (at the supermarket nearby)
  • Next, my mom washed them
  • and I made the sauce/dressing (sốt salad).
  • Then I mix them together.

The dish tasted/was fresh and delicious.

  • Also, we ordered some chicken breast. (You know, it is very healthy because it is rich in protein). The chicken was super juicy and tender.

We ate a lot that day.

So, that was my last time eating healthy food.

scripts.name: Health
scripts.html:
1. Ideas on what good health is and how to maintain health change frequently. What did people do to maintain good health when you were a child? What was considered to be a healthy diet at that time? How do people usually exercise? Describe how people's thoughts on what is healthy have changed over time.

People's ideas about health have changed over time.

My grandparents think that being chubby is healthy, so they believe eating a lot is good.

But now, people think being fit is healthy. They often diet and exercise to stay in shape.

So, people in the past and now have different ideas about what is healthy

2 - Describe a healthy person you know of. What makes that person healthy? Tell me everything about the things that make that person healthier.

My wife cares a lot about her health.

She works out whenever she can, exercises at the gym, and walks as much as possible.

She also eats healthy and tries to avoid unhealthy food like fast food.

She makes sure to drink plenty of water every day.

She also gets enough sleep to stay healthy.

So These are the things that make my wife healthy


3 - Have you ever changed a habit or a certain lifestyle for your health? Maybe you started to work out or started to eat healthy. Tell me about that change you made

Eating healthy helped me stay healthy and lose weight.

First, I tried to eat vegetables and fruits often. They have a lot of vitamins and fiber.

I also ate fish and chicken breasts whenever I could. They are full of healthy protein.

I tried to eat organic food too. It’s not grown with chemicals, so it’s much healthier.

Eating healthy really helped me stay healthy and lose weight.

4 - Talk about one thing that you did for your health in detail. What kind of impact did it have on your health? Give me all the details about the effect that had on your health

To stay healthy,

I tried to work out whenever I could. I exercised at the gym, went for runs at the park, and did other activities like riding bikes, hiking, swimming, and playing soccer or basketball. I also took yoga, Pilates, and CrossFit classes.

I also tried to eat well. I had balanced meals and tried not to eat too much or too late. I avoided eating fast food too fast, too salty, or greasy food.

I also tried to stay positive by looking on the bright side of things, which helped me reduce stress.

These are the things I did to stay healthy.

scripts.name: Restaurant
scripts.html:
Topic : Restaurant

Vocabulary

Restaurant , eat out places : nhà hàng, chỗ ăn ở ngoài

Take-out restaurant: nhà hàng bán đồ mua về

fast food restaurant: nhà hàng đồ ăn nhanh

On busy street with a lot of foot traffic: trên con phố đông người qua lại

Crowded: đông người

Around: xung quanh

Hot pot: lẩu ♨️

  • 🍜 broth / soup base: nước lẩu
    • Spices
    • Bones
    • Mushrooms
  • Raw food: đồ sống
    • Vegetables
    • Meat: fish, pork, chicken, beef
  • Pot: nồi

Customers , diners : khách hàng, thực khách

Cook ____ myself: (tôi) tự nấu

Cook ____ themselves: (họ) tự nấu

(Food stall - quầy hàng ăn)

Fast food:

  • fried chicken
  • Ketchup
  • (French) fries 🍟
  • crispy and crunchy
  • Burger : 🍔
  • Hot dog : 🌭
  • Side dish (đồ ăn kèm): salad
  • A can of Coke: 1 lon coca → soft drinks: nước ngọt

Enjoyable: ~ great

Menu → pre-set menu: menu có các món được xếp sẵn cho khách đặt

Prepare ___ quickly : chuẩn bị cái gì rất nhanh

especially: đặc biệt là

Bài cũ:

Ordered ___ online: đặt đồ trên mạng

Don’t have time to cook: không có thời gian nấu

Convenient: tiện lợi

Office worker: NV văn phòng
