Take naps: ngủ trưa → have more energy ⚡

For + bữa : cho bữa ăn …

Nhà hàng phổ biến (Lẩu + Fast Food)

**1 - I would like to know about restaurants in your country

What do typical restaurants look like? What kinds of food do they commonly offer?**

Sample 1:

There are many hot pot restaurants in Vietnam.

Tả nhà hàng

  • They are usually (located) on busy streets with a lot of foot traffic.
  • They are usually crowded, (especially on weekends.)

Tả khách:

  • Diners usually sit around a big pot with hot soup base ♨️.
  • They cook raw food in the pot and eat together.

Tả đồ ăn:

  • 🫕 There are mushrooms, bones and spices in the soup.

In the menu, there is:

  • beef
  • fish
  • Chicken
  • vegetables
  • musủhooms

to eat with hot pot

So, hot pot restaurants are very popular in my country.

**2 - Tell me about a restaurant you ate out at recently

What kind of restaurant was it? What was their menu and what did you eat? Who did you go with? Did you like how the food tasted?**

Sample 1

I remember eating hot pot with my family last week.

We went to a famous hot pot restaurant near my house.

The restaurant had many kinds of food.

  • 🥩 In their menu, they had: pork, beef and seafood.
  • 🥬 Plus, they had/there were many kinds of vegetables.
  • 🍄 I liked their mushrooms the most.
  • 🍺 They served it with / Their drinks were soft drinks and beers.

My family had a beef hot pot.

  • 🥓 The meat was very juicy and tender.
  • 🫕 The soup base was delicious.
  • 🌝 We ate a lot that day.
  • 🍺 We drank several/some/a few rounds and had a lot of fun.
  • 😄 (We had a good time there)

So, that was the last time I ate out.

3. Now tell me about a restaurant you used to go to as a child. What was it? Like, what did you eat? Who did you go with? What do you remember most about that place? Tell me about that restaurant in as much detail as possible?

I remember going to Burger King near my house when I was a kid.

The burger tasted amazing.

The french fries were so crispy and crunchy.

Other side dishes were very tasty as well.

I can still remember how good the food was.

Looking back. It was one of the most memorable fast food chains in my childhood.

**3 - Talk about the last time you used a take out or delivery food service

What did you get and where was it? What do you remember about that experience?**

I remember buying fried chicken at a take-out restaurant near my place last week.

  • I ordered a big combo. It had:
    • a lot of fried chicken / chicken wings / chicken thighs
    • French fries and a burger
    • it came with/had a can of coke.
    • Salad was the side dish.

I took the food home to eat.

  • The chicken was (super) juicy and tender. I loved eating it with ketchup 🍅.
  • Next, I ate a burger. It tasted wonderful / was delicious / was tasty.
  • The French fries were so crispy and crunchy.
  • The salad was fresh.
  • Finally, I drank a can of Coke.

It was a very enjoyable meal.

**4 - Talk about a time when you prepared for a special occasion using a take out or delivery service

What kinds of food did you get from the restaurant? Tell me about that experience with lots of details.**

I remember ordering food online on my birthday (party) last year.

My family was busy with work so we didn't have time to cook.

📱 We decided to order food online to eat at home.

  • 🌐 First, we went online and ordered fried chicken from KFC ( - a fast food restaurant.)
  • ⏱️ Then, we waited for 30 minutes.

The food was delicious.

  • The chicken was juicy and tender. I loved eating it with ketchup.
  • Next, I ate a burger. It tasted wonderful.
  • The French fries were (so crispy and) crunchy.
  • The salad was fresh.
  • Finally, I drank a can of Coke.

🎂 My mom also bought/ordered a birthday cake.

😃 We had a lot of fun that day. = We had a great time that day.

🌝 I ate a lot.

It was a very enjoyable= pleasant = memorable birthday party.

scripts.name: Coffee shops
scripts.html:
1. You indicated that you go to cafés or coffee shops. describe what coffee shops in your country look like in general. describe the café you go to most often as well.

Coffee shops are everywhere in Vietnam these days

Many coffee shops are on busy streets with a lot of foot traffic.

The cashier at the entrance where people make their orders and get their drinks.

There are many tables and chairs in the coffee shop.

They serve many kinds of drinks, such as: tea, coffee and juice.

So, these are the things about coffee shops in my country.

  1. What do you normally do when you go to coffee shops? Are there meetings or gatherings there? Tell me what you like to do.

Coffee shops are my favorite places for many reasons.

I go there to hang out with my friends most often.

We order some drinks and enjoy them while talking about work and life.

We often take photos and post them on social media.

I like the music at the coffee shops. It helps me chill and clear my mind.

Besides, I often go there when I need a quiet and private place to do my work.

So, these are the things I do at cafes nowadays.

  1. Tell me about a memorable or unforgettable incident that happened at a café. What happened? Who was involved? How do you deal with the situation? Tell me everything about what happened from beginning to end.

I remember once having a terrible experience at a coffee shop

At first I went to a coffee shop with my friends, we choose a small Cafe near our University

The cafe looked sketchy but anyway we decided to get in

I think I drink something that went bad

My stomach was upset

I had to go to the bathroom over and over again

I took some medicine to get better

Since then, I have tried to be more careful when choosing a coffee shop

  1. Talk about the first coffee shop you went to. What was special about that place? What do you remember the most?

I remember the first time I went to a coffee shop when I was in high school.

There wasn’t a special reason why I started going to coffee shops. I mostly went to hang out with my friends.

The coffee shop was on a busy street near my school.

At the cafe, people made their orders and waited to enjoy their drinks.

I loved that cafe because it was a great place to hang out with my friends.

That’s all about the first time I went to a coffee shop.

scripts.name: Transportation
scripts.html:
1 - Tell me about how people get around in your country.

Do they drive their own cars or take trains?

What are some typical means of transportation to get around?

People in my country get around in different ways.

Many people drive motorbikes to work or travel because they are easy to drive and can move through traffic during busy times.

Some people prefer driving cars because they are safer and faster.

But since parking is limited in the city center, many people take the bus instead. The bus service isn’t modern, but it’s very cheap, so people can save money.

So, people in my country use different types of transportation.

2 - What means of transportation do you use to get around

Do you drive or take public transportation

I drive my motorcycle most often. It is very convenient because I can go wherever I want to. It saves my time because it is flexible to move during peak hours. It’s easy to drive and can move through traffic during busy times.

However, I usually use bus service when the weather is bad. It is cheap and safe to get around by bus.

So, I use bus service or drive my own motorbike to get around.

3 - How did you travel when you were a child

Were the types of transportation different back then?

Describe for me how people used to get around in your city or town.

When I was a kid, there were not many cars.

I used to ride my bike to get around.

People used to take the bus or trains, but they were very slow.

Now, I drive my car to get around. It is faster and safer.

Nowadays, people can take elevated trains = skyline trains or the subway to get around.

Sometimes, they go by plane to save their time.

So, transportation has become a lot better over the years.

6 - Problems related to transportation often arise, cars break down, trains run late, or traffic could get bad.

Tell me about a transportation problem that you once had

What did you do to deal with the situation?

I remember when I was stuck in traffic jam for a long time.

It was during the holidays.

I was on my way to my friend’s house.

I couldn’t move because there were so many cars on the street.

It took me 4 hours to get to my friend’s house.

I was very tired when I arrived.

Since then, I’ve tried to avoid driving during holidays.

scripts.name: Text messages
scripts.html:
• 1 - You indicated in the survey that you exchange text messages with friends. What kinds of text messages do you send? What are they about?

I send text messages to my friends and co-workers every day.

First, I send text messages to my friends to ask them about their days.

Sometimes, I give them some updates on my life and work through text messages.

Second, I send text messages to my co-workers every day.

I let them know about the meeting and the project.

I also send text messages to invite them to lunch or dinner.

So, these are the text messages I send every day.

  • 2 - Tell me when and where you send text messages most often. Plus, who do you exchange text messages with?

I send text messages to my friends and my co-workers most often.

I usually do that when I am on a bus getting to work.

I sometimes send text messages to my friends when I am having lunch or during my break time.

I often send text messages to my co-workers when I am at work.

So, I send text messages to my friends and co-workers whenever I need to.

  • 3 - Tell me about a memorable text message you got in the past. Who was it from and what was it about? What made that text message more memorable than others?

I remember getting a text message from my old friend. It was on my birthday.

We hadn't seen each other for a long time. I was very surprised and happy when I saw her message. She said she missed me and wished me the best. She still remembered my birthday and gave me a beautiful gift, which made my birthday very special.

So, it was the most memorable text message I remember.

6 - We sometimes have problems while sending text messages. Tell me about a time when you had trouble sending text messages. Start by giving me some background and then explain what you did to deal with the situation.

I remember sending a message to the wrong person on Facebook.

I got two tickets for a new movie at a cinema and wanted to invite my friend to see it with me. I intended to send her a message about the movie, the time, and the cinema. But I accidentally sent it to my boss instead. I was so embarrassed. I apologized for my mistake.

Luckily, he thought it was a funny incident and hoped I enjoyed the movie with my friends. Since then, I always double-check who I’m sending a message to before hitting send. So, this was the problem I had with messages.

scripts.name: Banks
scripts.html:
1- Tell me about the banks in your country. What do they typically look like? Where are they usually located?

There are many banks in Vietnam.

most of them are in big cities these day. Many banks are on busy streets and in downtown areas.

There are ATMs outside where you can get cash. Security guards stand outside the bank to help protect it and the customers.

Inside the banks, the tellers wear uniforms. There are a lot of seats in the waiting area for customers.

So, this is what banks in Vietnam look like.

2- What do you do from the moment you walk into the bank until you walk out? Tell me everything about what goes on when you visit the bank.

When I go to the bank, I first get a number and wait for my turn.

When they call my number, I go to the teller, and she helps me with what I need.

Most of the time, I check my balance or make wire transfers.

Sometimes, I open or close an account.

I also deposit or withdraw money.

Sometimes, I exchange foreign currency.

I might get a loan, have my card issued, or pay bills and traffic tickets.

These are the things I do at the bank.

3- Banks have definitely changed over time. Tell me about a bank you remember from your childhood What did the bank look like? How was it different from banks today?

In the past, I had to go to the bank in person to do my banking. Sometimes, I had to wait for hours to finish a transaction. It was inconvenient and took a lot of time.

But now, I can do mobile banking whenever I want. Banking has become much easier than before. It saves me time and energy.

To do mobile banking, I need a password and a security card. I mostly make wire transfers through mobile banking.

So, mobile banking is one of the biggest changes.

6- Sometimes, problems can arise when you are at the bank. Tell me in detail about a problem you had that involved your bank. Maybe the bank was closed or perhaps the bank might have made some kind of problem. Tell me about how you solved that problem.

I remember going to the bank to pay a bill. Usually, I pay my bills on my phone, but at that time, the bank gave a notice that their online system was under maintenance, so customers had to go to the bank in person to pay bills.

When I got to the bank, there were so many people. I first got a number and took a seat to wait for my turn. But there were ten people waiting in front of me.

I kept waiting, and when it was finally my turn, the teller told me that it was closing time and asked if I could come back the next day. I was so frustrated. I had canceled my meeting to go to the bank and still got nothing done.

Since then, I try to avoid going to the bank during busy hours.

scripts.name: Appointment
scripts.html:
1 - What kinds of appointments do you make in your life?

Where do you go to make your appointments?

I make different types of appointments in my life.

First, I make doctor appointments when I am sick or need to get some tests done.

I also make dentist appointments when I have a toothache or need to get my teeth cleaned.

Plus, I make hair appointments when I need a haircut.

These are the appointments I make in my life.

2- What kinds of things do you do when you make appointments?

Tell me what you exactly do when you make these appointments

When I have to make appointments, I first look for a phone number. Sometimes, I already have it on my phone. If I don’t, I search online for it.

Then, I make a phone call to book the appointment. I ask when they are available and tell them when I want to come in. After that, I hang up.

I usually get a text confirming my appointment.

This is what I do when I make appointments.

3 - Talk about an appointment you made as a child

What was the appointment for?

Was it for a doctor, a dentist, or a new school?

What did you actually do and what happened when you got to your appointment?

I remember making a hair appointment when I was a kid. I needed a haircut.

I went to the salon on time.

First, the hairstylist shampooed my hair. Then, she cut it.

After that, she shampooed it again.

Next, she dried and styled it. The hairstylist did a great job, and I was happy with my new look.

6 - Unexpected things can happen When you make an appointment

Talk about a memorable incident related to an appointment

What exactly happened and how did you deal with the situation?

I remember making a hair appointment recently.

- making a doctor appointment

- making a dentist appointment

- making an appointment for a massage

- making an appointment for a manicure/pedicure.

However, something at work came up suddenly, so I had to take care of it right away.

It was a serious problem with a new product, so I couldn’t leave until everything was solved.

Thus, I could not make it to my appointment.

I called the hair salon and told them that I could NOT go.

+the clinic +the hospital + the dentist +the spa

They were very understanding and agreed to reschedule my appointment to another day.

In the end, I made a new appointment and went another time.

scripts.name: Geography
scripts.html:
Topic 23. Geography

Vocabulary

well-known for/famous for: nổi tiếng vì

an S-line shape: hình chữ S

tropical climate: khí hậu nhiệt đới

breathtaking: ngoạn mục

scenery: cảnh

scenic landscapes: nhiều cảnh đẹp

north: phía bắc

south: phía Nam

(beautiful) white sand beaches: bãi biển đẹp với bờ cát trắng

a long coastline: đường bờ biển dài

neighboring country: quốc gia láng giềng

the Great Wall: Vạn Lý Trường Thành

magnificent: hoành tráng ; hùng vĩ

stunning: rất đẹp ; rất ấn tượng (đến ngây người)

traditional food: đồ ăn truyền thống

located: nằm tại, có vị trí ở

a great ocean view: có cảnh biển đẹp (tả khách sạn)

outdoor activities: các hoạt động ngoài trời

Tả đất nước

❓ 1 - Describe your country’s geography to me. Are there mountains, lakes, or rivers? What is your country like?

Sample: (Quay về Domestic trips)

Vietnam is located on the Indochina peninsula. The country has an S-shape. I think Vietnam is the most beautiful country in the world.

With a tropical climate, Vietnam is famous for its beautiful scenery. There are hills and mountains in the north and white sand beaches in the south. Some beaches are popular vacation spots. Many rivers run through big cities.

Vietnam has a long coastline, so tourism is growing. Sapa, Ha Long Bay, and Danang are famous tourist spots that many foreign visitors love.

I think Vietnamese people are very lucky to live in such a beautiful country.

❓ 7 - Tell me a little bit about a country close to your country. Talk about what the country looks like, and about its people and some of its traditions.

Sample:

China is our neighboring country. It is the largest country in Asia.

China has many beautiful landscapes with rivers and mountains. I went to the Great Wall, and it was amazing!

Chinese people are friendly and kind. They celebrate Chinese New Year, which is their most important festival.

China is also famous for traditional foods like tofu, Beijing roasted duck, and dumplings.

So, China, our neighboring country, is very beautiful and close to Vietnam.

Tả kỷ niệm

❓2 - I would like you to pick a favorite place in your country from your childhood. Describe that place in detail. What was your memory of that place?

❓ 3 - People often have memorable or moving experiences when they explore their country's geography

You might have climbed a famous mountain or might have swum at a beautiful beach. Tell me a memorable story of when you visited a natural place in your country.

❓ 6 - Tell me about an early memory of your country's geography. Perhaps it was a special place or an important landmark. What were your memories about that place?

Sample:

👉🏻 I remember going to the beach for a vacation with my family when I was a kid. We went to Da Nang and stayed at a beachside hotel.

The hotel had a great view of the ocean. We stayed there for three days.

In the morning, we got up early and went to the beach to enjoy sunrise. I love fresh ocean air and the sound of waves crashing to the beach.

During the day we swam in the ocean and played in the sand.

Da Nang had many beautiful white sand beaches and amazing scenery. We took lots of pictures and posted them up on social media.

In the evening, we went out for seafood, we had raw fish and shellfish.

After dinnner, we took a walk along the beach, enjoying the sunset. Sometimes we play with some firecrackers.

I really enjoyed every minute of that vacation at the beach.

So this was a memorable place I visited (when I was a kid).

Tả hoạt động thường làm

❓ 5 - Tell me about the outdoor activities that are popular in your country. Do people go hiking bike, or swim?

What do people typically do outdoors?

❓ 8 - Please tell me about what kinds of free time activities people in your country do.

Sample:

People in my country do many outdoor activities.

First, many people like to travel to the beaches in the summer because Vietnam is famous for its beautiful white sand beaches.

Next, on weekends, people like to take walks in the park. Walking helps them stay fit and healthy.

Sometimes, they go camping or have a campfire with their family and friends.

So These are the popular outdoor activities in my country.

2 - Tell me about outdoor activities you engage in.

How does the geography of your country help you do that activity?

What do you usually do?

How often do you do it?

Who do you do it with?

Give me all the details.

I’d like to go to the beach in the summer.

  • When I go to the beach I don’t like to get too dark. So I first put on some sunblock during the day.
  • During the day, i like to swim in the ocean. I play with the sand or play with a ball on the beach as well.
  • At night many people enjoy themselves at the beachside. I also go out for food and drinks with people.
  • After dinner, I sometimes play with some firecrackers on the beach.
  • I like taking walks along the beach. It feels great to get some fresh air.
  • Last of all, I like to watch the sunrise or the sunset at the beach.

So these are the things I do when I'm at the beach.

scripts.name: Holidays
scripts.html:
1 - Tell me about some popular holidays In your country

Where do people typically celebrate these holidays?

What kinds of things do they do to celebrate?

Tet and Mid-Autumn are the most popular holidays in Vietnam.

Family members get together at their houses to celebrate the biggest holiday of the year.

They ask how each other is doing and do some catching up.

They cook traditional food and enjoy meals together.

Plus, they give all family members the best wishes.

Also, They go to the pagoda to pray for health and good luck.

So, these are the things people do during family gatherings.

2 - Talk about a holiday memory from your childhood

Tell me where you were and what that place looked like

Tell me everything that you remember from that holiday scene.

I remember going to my grandma’s place with my parents when l was a kid.

It was a lunar year holiday.

After having dinner, we had a campfire in the backyard of my grandma’s house.

My grandpa played the guitar and we all sang along to the songs.

We played some board games and we had so much fun.

Then, we watched the fireworks together. It was very beautiful because it was the first time I saw fireworks.

Looking back, it was a special holiday at my grandma’s place.

3 - Talk about the most recent holiday you celebrated.

Why was that holiday memorable:

Was there anything special about that day

Talk about why that holiday was particularly unforgettable.

I remember going to my friend's house on mid autumn holiday last week.

We had dinner together and enjoyed some drinks.

However, we ended up drinking quite a lot that day.

I got very drunk because I drank too much. My stomach was upset. I felt dizzy and I could not walk straight.

I had a hangover the next day.

It took me quite a while to sober up.

Since then, I try to be more careful when I’m drinking

scripts.name: Clothing stores (1)
scripts.html:
1- I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out.

You are at a clothing store and need to get some clothes.

Ask two to three questions about the clothes you would like to buy.

Hello, how are you? Câu chào hỏi

I would like to get some new shirts. Câu diễn tả hoàn cảnh

Câu hỏi theo yêu cầu của đề bài.

Do you have any shirts in stock?

What kind of shirts do you have available?

How much is it?

Can you recommend anything?

Is there a website I can look at/see?

I wonder if there are any promotions?

2 - I'm sorry, but there is a problem I need you to resolve.

The clothes you have ordered have arrived, but one of the shirts has a problem.

Call the clothing store and explain the problem.

Give two to three alternatives to solve the problem.

Câu chào hỏi

Hello, is it ABC clothing store?

I’m calling about my order. I ordered some shirts from your store.

I’m a person who got some shirts at your store.

I’m afraid there’s something wrong with my shirt. one of those shirts is too small for me. I think it is in the wrong size.

Đưa ra phương án giải quyết

I would like to return the shirt. Can I get a refund?

I would like a refund, would that be possible?

I would like to get an exchange. Can I exchange it for a large one?

I would like to come in to get an exchange.

I Wonder if i could get a refund if i want to.

would that be possible?

I’m sorry for all the trouble.

Chào kết

Call me as soon as possible, please.

Thank you and have a good day.

3 - That's the end of the situation.

Have you ever been unhappy with something that you bought or some service you received?

What was the problem? How did you deal with the situation?

Tell me everything in detail.

I remember receiving the wrong bed last week .

I ordered a big double bed but the furniture store shipped a small single bed for kids.

It did not fit me (at all). I was disappointed with the poor service.

I called the store to get an exchange.

They agreed to give me a new bed. However, they said it could take a week for the bed to come.

I had to sleep on that small bed. It was very uncomfortable. I was mad about/unhappy with it. I decided to file a complaint about the inconvenience I had.

So, this was a problem I had when I bought a new bed.

scripts.name: Shopping
scripts.html:
1- I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out.

There is a newly opened store.

Call your friend who knows about the new store and ask some questions about the store to get some information.

Câu chào hỏi

Hello, Andy. How are you?

Câu hoàn cảnh

I’m calling to ask about the new store that you are working at.

Đặt câu hỏi theo yêu cầu của đề bài

What do they sell there?

Is there a website I can see?

What are the business hours?

I wonder if there are any promotions?

Câu chào kết

Call me back as soon as possible please.

Thank you and have a good day.

2- I'm sorry, but there is a problem I need you to resolve.

You left your wallet behind at the store.

Call the store and explain your situation.

Give several alternatives to solve the problem.

Câu chào hỏi

Hello, is it ABC clothing store?

Câu hoàn cảnh

I was shopping at your store this morning and

I’m a person who got some clothes at your store.

I think I left my wallet behind.

Đưa ra các phương án giải quyết vấn đề

Can you check if you have my wallet?

If so, I’ll drop by to get it right away.

Would that be possible,

I’m sorry for the trouble.

Can you tell me when i can visit your store?

What are your business hours?

How late are you open?

Can you check the camera if someone has taken my wallet?

Can you please send it to my address?

Can I come tomorrow to get it?

Can you tell me when I can come and get it?

Câu chào kết

Call me as soon as possible, please.

Thank you and have a good day.

3-That's the end of the situation.

Have you ever left something behind at a restaurant or at a store?

It could be your wallet, your cell phone, or anything that was important.

Give me all the details.

I remember leaving my phone behind at the restaurant last month.

It was my friend's birthday, we went to a restaurant near my house to celebrate her birthday.

We had so much fun together, I also took many beautiful photos with my phone and posted them on Facebook.

When I got home, I found out that I left my phone behind at the restaurant.

I was very scared/ confused so I called the restaurant to check if they had my phone.

Luckily, they found my phone on the table where we had dinner.

I went to the restaurant the next day to get it.

I thanked them for helping me find my phone.

So, it was the time I left my phone at the restaurant.

scripts.name: Food stores
scripts.html:
1- I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out.

Your friend told you about a food store that he or she goes to.

Call your friend and ask about the food store to get some information.

Câu chào hỏi

Hello, Liz. This is Brian.

Câu hoàn cảnh

I'm calling to ask about the food store you talked about.

I would like to get some groceries there.

Câu hỏi theo yêu cầu

What kinds of groceries do they have available?

Can you tell me how much they are?

Can you recommend anything?

Is there perhaps a website | can see?

I wonder if there are any promotions.

Plus, can you give me directions to the store?

Is it close to the subway station?

Is it within walking distance?

Câu chào kết

Call me as soon as possible, please.

Thank you and have a good day

2- I'm sorry, but there is a problem I need you to resolve.

You have accidentally left your groceries behind at the food store.

Call the food store and explain the situation. Give two to three solutions.

Câu chào hỏi

Hello, is it ABC food store?

Câu hoàn cảnh

I'm a person who got groceries at your store.

I'm afraid I left my groceries behind at your store.

l got some bread, meat, and some wine.

Câu hỏi theo yêu cầu

Could you please check if you have my groceries?

If so, I'll drop by to get it right away.

Would that be possible?

Can you tell me when I can visit your store?

What are your business hours?

Câu chào kết

Please call me back as soon as possible, please.

Thank you and have a good day.

3- That's the end of the situation.

Talk about the food store you go to often.

How did you first go there? What is special about that store and what do they offer?

I found out about a new food store near my house from my friend.

He took me to the new store to get some food.

At first, I was impressed because the store was very big.

They sold many kinds of foods such as seafood, beef and chicken.

The price was very good.

Sometimes, they had big promotions, so I could save a lot of money.

Now, they also offer Korean food and Japanese food.

I go there to buy kimchi and sushi every weekend.

So, this was how I found out about a new store.

scripts.name: Trips (1)
scripts.html:
1 - I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out.

You are planning on going on a trip.

Call a travel agency and ask three or four questions about the trip you want to go on.

Hello, I'm calling to ask about package trips.

I would like to go on a vacation.

What kinds of package trips do you have available?

Can you tell me how much they are?

Can you recommend anything?

Is there perhaps a website I can see?

I wonder if there are any promotions.

Plus, can you give me directions to your office?

Is it close to the subway station?

Is it within walking distance?

Please call me back as soon as possible. Thank you.

2 - I'm sorry, but there is a problem I need you to resolve.

You got a phone call from a travel agent and you have been informed that there is a problem with the trip that you wanted to go on and it is not available now.

Call your friend, explain the situation and then give two to three alternatives.

Hello, Jake. This is Brian.

I have some bad news.

I just talked to the travel agency.

They told me that the package trip is fully booked.

Can you tell me What would you like to do?

Why DON'T we go next time?

What do you say if we go next week?

Or, maybe we could go another time.

Let me know your thoughts.

I’m good with whatever you decide.

Give me a call when you get this. Thanks.

6 - That's the end of the situation.

There are times when something out of the ordinary happens while traveling.

I wonder if you have ever experienced anything surprising, unexpected or unusual during a trip. Start by telling when and where you were. And then, tell me why it was so unforgettable.

**Mất ví:**

I remember losing my wallet when I traveled to Danang with my family/friend … recently

When I arrived at the airport, my wallet was still in my bag.

Then, we took a taxi to the hotel.

I found out I lost my wallet when we checked in at the hotel.

I was very nervous and confused.

It took me a few hours to look for it, but it was nowhere to be found / but I couldn’t find it. I was so frustrated because I kept all of my cards and my ID inside the wallet.

In the end, my wife/friend had to pay for the (whole) trip.

It was a nice trip because of the delicious food and the beautiful landscape, but it could have been a wonderful experience if I had not lost my wallet.

Since then, I have tried to be more careful when traveling.

**Đau bụng:**

I remember eating something wrong during a trip.

We went to a local seafood restaurant, which was widely known for having fresh and excellent quality seafood.

At first, I enjoyed the food so much, it tasted amazing.

Suddenly, I felt uncomfortable, I think I ate something that went bad/ I was allergic to.

(I got food poisoning/ allergy and it was pretty bad.)

My stomach was upset.

- I had a fever and I felt light-headed/very bad.

I started vomiting and stayed in the bathroom for an hour.

My mother went to the drug store and got some medicine.

I took some medicine to get better.

I had to stay inside and **get a lot of rest.**

Since then, I have tried to be more careful (when I'm eating something) while traveling.

scripts.name: Trips
scripts.html:
- 1 - I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out.

You are planning on going on a trip.

Call a travel agency and ask three or four questions about the trip you want to go on.

Hello, I'm calling to ask about package trips.

I would like to go on a vacation.

What kinds of package trips do you have available?

Can you tell me how much they are?

Can you recommend anything?

Is there perhaps a website I can see?

I wonder if there are any promotions.

Plus, can you give me directions to your office?

Is it close to the subway station?

Is it within walking distance?

Please call me back as soon as possible. Thank you.

- 2 - I'm sorry, but there is a problem I need you to resolve.

You got a phone call from a travel agent and you have been informed that there is a problem with the trip that you wanted to go on and it is not available now.

Call your friend, explain the situation and then give two to three alternatives.

Hello, Jake. This is Brian.

I have some bad news.

I just talked to the travel agency.

They told me that the package trip is fully booked.

Can you tell me what you want to do?

Why DON'T we go next time?

What do you say if we go next week?

Or, maybe we could go another time.

Can you tell me what you think?

I'm fine with whatever you decide.

Give me a call when you get this. Thanks.

- 6 - That's the end of the situation.

There are times when something out of the ordinary happens while traveling.

I wonder if you have ever experienced anything surprising, unexpected or unusual during a trip. Start by telling when and where you were. And then, tell me why it was so unforgettable.

**Mất ví:**

I remember losing my wallet when I traveled to Danang with my family/friend … recently

When I arrived at the airport, my wallet was still in my bag.

Then, we took a taxi to the hotel.

I found out I lost my wallet when we checked in at the hotel.

I was very nervous and confused.

It took me a few hours to look for it, but it was nowhere to be found / but I couldn’t find it. I was so frustrated because I kept all of my cards and my ID inside the wallet.

In the end, my wife/friend had to pay for the (whole) trip.

It was a nice trip because of the delicious food and the beautiful landscape, but it could have been a wonderful experience if I had not lost my wallet.

Since then, I have tried to be more careful when traveling.

**Đau bụng:**

I remember eating something wrong during a trip.

We went to a local seafood restaurant, which was widely known for having fresh and excellent quality seafood.

At first, I enjoyed the food so much, it tasted amazing.

Suddenly, I felt uncomfortable, I think I ate something that went bad/ I was allergic to.

(I got food poisoning/ allergy and it was pretty bad.)

My stomach was upset.

- I had a fever and I felt light-headed/very bad.

I started vomiting and stayed in the bathroom for an hour.

My mother went to the drug store and got some medicine.

I took some medicine to get better.

I had to stay inside and **get a lot of rest.**

Since then, I have tried to be more careful (when I'm eating something) while traveling.

scripts.name: Geography
scripts.html:
1. I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. You are planning on going on a trip to a country where your friend lives. Call your friend and ask about the geography there and then ask two or three questions regarding your travel plans.

- chào hỏi:

Hi Sam! It's huy. How are you?

- hoàn cảnh:

I'm planning to visit your country next month. I'm excited to see you and explore your country!

- thông tin:

1. Can you tell me about the geography there? What weather should I prepare for?

2. What places do you suggest I visit? I want to see nature and culture.

3. How's the transportation there? Should I rent a car or use public transport?

-kết:

Thanks for the helpful info. I'm looking forward to seeing you soon. Bye for now!

  1. I'm sorry but there is a problem that I need you to resolve. You cannot go on the trip because of some reason. Call your friend and explain the situation and give two to three alternatives.
  • "Hi Sam, this is huy."
  • "I have some bad news.
  • I can't go on our trip next week.
  • My boss just told me I have to work on an important project."
  • Something came up suddenly at work, so i have to take care of it right away. It is a serious problem with a new product, so I can’t leave until everything is solved.
  • "I'm really sorry about this.
    1. Can you tell me what you want to do?
    2. Why DON'T we go next time?
    3. What do you say if we go next month?
    4. Or, maybe we could go another time.
    5. Can you tell me what you think?
    6. I'm fine with whatever you decide.
  • Give me a call when you get this. Thanks.
  1. Postpone the trip to next month
  2. You could go with our other friend, Mike
  3. We could plan a shorter weekend trip instead"
  • "Let me know what you think. I hope we can still do something fun together soon. Talk to you later, bye!"
  1. That's the end of the situation. Have you ever been on a trip to another country? How was the geography there different from your country's geography?

I remember traveling to a famous island in Thailand call Phuket with my family last year.

Thailand is our neighboring country.

The geography of Vietnam and Thailand are the same.

Thailand has many beautiful landscapes with beautiful rivers and mountains.

    • In Phuket we visited some beautiful natural caves and many small Islands.
    • We also played volleyball and built sandcastles on the beach.
    • The weather was always sunny and warm.
    • I have to say that it was a great place to relax and recharge my battery.

I really enjoyed myself there.

I felt very happy and excited when I traveled there

scripts.name: Hotels (1)
scripts.html:
- 1 - I’d like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out.

You have arrived in a new city and you're trying to stay for the night

Go to the reception desk of a hotel. Describe the room you want and ask three or four questions to get information about what is available.

Câu chào hỏi

Hello, How are you?

Câu hoàn cảnh

I would like to stay at this hotel for 2 nights

I would like a single room with a view of the beach.

I would like to check in around 6pm.

Câu hỏi thông tin

Do you have any vacancies for tonight?

What kinds of rooms do you have available?

Can you tell me how much they are?

Can you recommend anything?

Is there perhaps a website I can see?

I wonder if there are any promotions.

- 2 - I’m sorry but there is a problem you need you to resolve.

You've learned that there are no rooms available in this hotel

Call your travel companions to let them know about the situation.

Leave a message to describe the situation and propose alternative solutions to the problem.

Câu chào hỏi

Hello guys. It’s me,huy.

Câu hoàn cảnh

I have some bad news

I just talked to the hotel.

They told me that the hotel is fully booked.

Câu giải pháp

Can you tell me what you want to do?

Why DON'T we go next time?

What do you think if we go next week?

Or, maybe we could go another time.

Can you tell me what you think?

I'm fine with whatever you decide.

Câu chào kết

Call me back as soon as possible, please.

Thanks and have a good day.

- 3 - That's the end of the situation.

Think about a time when your travel plans did not work out as expected.

What happened? Tell me all about the circumstances, what you and the others did and how the situation was finally resolved

I remember when I was supposed to go on a trip with my friends.

We had a plan to travel to Nha Trang last summer.

However, I got sick because I tested positive for Covid-19 the night before the trip.

I had a bad headache and a terrible sore throat.

I had a fever and bad cough

I had to stay inside and isolate myself from everyone.

I felt bad about missing the trip, but there was nothing I could do. I told my friends I couldn’t make it and apologized.

They felt sorry for me and hoped I would recover soon. In the end, we canceled the trip because they didn’t want to go without me.

In the end, I told them to go without me and have fun on the trip.

Looking back, it was a pity that I missed the trip that time.

scripts.name: Weather (1)
scripts.html:
- 1 - I’d like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out

You are going on a vacation to another country.

Call a hotel in that country and ask what the weather is like there?

You want to know what clothes you should bring on your trip.

Ask two or three more questions regarding your travel plans

Câu chào hỏi

Hello. Is it ABC hotel?

Câu hoàn cảnh

I'm calling to ask about the weather near the hotel.

I would like to know what clothes I should bring.

Câu hỏi thông tin

Could you tell me the weather there?

- What is the temperature?

- Is it hot and humid?

- Is it rainy and windy?

Can you recommend anything?

Câu chào kết

Please call me back as soon as possible. Thank you.

- 11 - I’m sorry but there is a problem I need you to resolve

The clothes that you have brought with you on your vacation are not suitable for the weather. Call a clothing store and explain the situation

Ask two or three questions about the kinds of clothes they have on sale

Hello, I'm calling to ask about some new clothes.

I would like to get some new clothes.

What kinds of clothes do you have available?

Can you tell me how much they are?

Can you recommend anything?

Is there a website I can see?

I wonder if there are any promotions.

Plus, can you give me directions to your store?

Is it close to the subway station?

Is it within walking distance?

Please call me back as soon as possible. Thank you.

- 12 - That's the end of the situation

Have you ever had any trouble due to unexpected weather?

What happened? Who were you with? How did you deal with the situation?

Tell me everything about what happened due to the unexpected weather.

Câu 3 của weather - Trận lũ ở Hà Nội


 I remember a serious flood happened during our trip to ….. with my family last ….

There were strong winds and heavy rainfall. There were floods all over the place.

Many houses and cars went underwater.

It was very dangerous, so many famous tourist attractions had to close for days.

Transportation had to be shut down.

We had to stay inside the hotel and store our food for days.

I was very disappointed because we couldn’t go to many interesting places/ missed out on many things.

The worst thing is that our return flight was canceled due to = because of the bad weather, so we had to stay there 2 more days.

So, this was a serious weather condition I remember.

scripts.name: Business trips (1)
scripts.html:
1 - You are going on a trip on business to another country

Call a hotel that you want to stay at and ask three of four questions about the hotel

Hello, is it ABC hotel?

I would like to stay there for my business trip.

I would like to stay for two nights.

I would like to check in around 6 pm.

Do you have any vacancies for next Monday?

What kinds of rooms do you have available?

Can you tell me how much they are?

Can you recommend anything?

Is there perhaps a website I can see?

I wonder if there are any promotions.

Please call me back as soon as possible. Thank you.

2 - You were supposed to go on the business trip to another country with your boss, however, something came up suddenly and you can't go

Call your boss to explain the situation. and make two to three suggestions that will help you continue your business with the company overseas.

Hello, boss. This is Brian.

I have some bad news.

I don't think I can make it to the business trip.

Something has come up suddenly.

I would like to reschedule this trip

Can I call the customers to arrange a new meeting?

Would that be possible?

I'm sorry for all the trouble.

Can you tell me what you think?

I'm fine with whatever you decide.

Call me back when you get this. Thanks.

3 - Have you ever had a problem during a trip you took on business or for leisure?

What was the nature of the problem and how did you deal with the situation? Describe in detail about what happened.

**Mất ví:**

I remember losing my wallet when I traveled to Danang with my family/friend … recently

When I arrived at the airport, my wallet was still in my bag.

Then, we took a taxi to the hotel.

I found out I lost my wallet when we checked in at the hotel.

I was very nervous and confused.

It took me a few hours to look for it, but it was nowhere to be found / but I couldn’t find it. I was so frustrated because I kept all of my cards and my ID inside the wallet.

In the end, my wife/friend had to pay for the (whole) trip.

It was a nice trip because of the delicious food and the beautiful landscape, but it could have been a wonderful experience if I had not lost my wallet.

Since then, I have tried to be more careful when traveling.

scripts.name: Furniture (1)
scripts.html:
1 - I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out.

You are at a store and you see a piece of furniture that you like.

Go to the clerk and ask three or four questions about the furniture you want to buy.

Câu chào hỏi

Hello, how are you?

Câu hoàn cảnh

I would like to get a new bed.

Câu hỏi theo yêu cầu của đề bài

What kinds of beds do you have available?

Can you tell me how much they are?

Can you recommend anything?

Is there perhaps a website I can see?

I wonder if there are any promotions.

2 -I'm sorry, but there is a problem I need you to resolve.

When you receive the furniture at home, there is a serious problem with it.

Call the store, explain the situation, and offer two to three alternatives to solve the problem.

Câu chào hỏi

Hello. Is it ABC furniture store?

Câu hoàn cảnh

I've just got some new furniture at your store.

I'm afraid there's something wrong with my bed.

It should be a queen-size bed, not a single bed.

Câu đưa ra phương án giải quyết

I would like to come in to get an exchange.,

I would like a refund. Would that be possible?

Can you tell me when I can visit your store?

What are your business hours?

Câu chào kết

Please call me back as soon as possible.

Thank you nà have a good day.

3 - That's the end of the situation.

Have you ever bought furniture but had a problem when you got it?

What was the problem and how did you deal with the situation?

I remember receiving the wrong bed last week .

I ordered a big double bed but the furniture store shipped a small single bed for kids.

It did not fit me (at all). I was disappointed with the poor service.

I called the store to get an exchange.

They agreed to give me a new bed. However, they said it could take a week for the bed to come.

I had to sleep on that small bed. It was very uncomfortable. I was mad about/unhappy with it. I decided to file a complaint about the inconvenience I had.

So, this was a problem I had at home.

scripts.name: Housing (1)
scripts.html:
1 - I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out.

You would like to find a house to live in. Call a management office and ask three or four questions about getting a house to live in.

Hello, is it the management office?

I would like to rent a three-bedroom apartment.

What kinds of apartments do you have available?

Can you tell me how much they are?

Can you recommend anything?

Is there perhaps a website I can see?

I wonder if there are any promotions.

Please call me back as soon as possible. Thank you.

2 - I'm sorry, but there is a problem I need you to resolve.

You have moved into the new house but found out that one of the windows in your apartment is broken. Call the repair shop.

Explain why you have to get a new window as soon as possible.

Hello, I'm a person who just moved in.

However, I found out that one of the windows is broken.

I need to get a new window.

- It is very dangerous at night.

- The wind is coming in and it's quite cold at night.

What kinds of windows do you have available?

Can you tell me how much they are?

Can you recommend anything?

Is there a website I can see?

I wonder if there are any promotions.

Please call me back as soon as possible. Thank you.

3 - That's the end of the situation.

Tell me about a time when you broke something at home.

What exactly happened and how did you solve the problem?

Give me all the details from beginning to end.

Câu cuối chủ đề furniture (bàn bị gãy chân)

I remember when a table in my room was broken.

My father bought this table for me on my 10th birthday. So, it was too old and its legs were getting weak.

One day, I put my bag on the table and one of the legs broke off.

All of my books fell on the floor.

I tried to get it fixed but it was impossible to fix it.

I was pretty sad because this table was a gift from my father and it held a lot of good memories from my childhood. Then, I decided to buy a new one.

So, this was a problem I had with my furniture.

scripts.name: Internet (1)
scripts.html:
INTERNET

11 - I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out.

Your friend has found a cool website. Call your friend and ask three or four questions about the website he/she has found.

Hi Brian, this is John.

I’m calling to ask about the website you mentioned. I’d like to check it out.

Can you tell me the web address?

  • Can you add friends or follow people?
  • Can you post pictures or videos?
  • Can you leave messages or comments?

I’m excited to explore the website. Please call me back as soon as you can. Thanks!

12 - I'm sorry, but there is a problem I need you to resolve.

You have tried to log on to that website, but there is something wrong with your web browser. Call the internet help desk and ask for help.

Explain why you need to get help as soon as possible.

Hello, is it the internet help desk?

I'm calling to ask for some help.

I’m afraid there's something wrong with my web browser.

I am having some connection problems.

I would like to come in to get some help.

Can you tell me when I can visit your office?

What are your business hours?

Please call me back as soon as possible. Thank you.

13 - That's the end of the situation.

How did you use the internet to get a project done in the past?

When was it? What was the project about? Give me all the details.

I remember doing a project at work recently.

I searched the internet and found useful data. I used this data to make my report better because it had a lot of information.

My boss was very happy because I gave him a detailed report. It was worth the time and effort.

Searching the internet helped me save time and energy while doing my project.

13 - That's the end of the situation. Have you ever had any trouble on the internet? Perhaps, you had difficulty using a website or you lost your internet connection. What was the exact problem and how did you deal with the situation?

(Đang họp online thì mất mạng)

Last week, I had a problem with my internet during an important online meeting. Suddenly, I lost my internet connection.

I tried to reconnect several times, but nothing worked. I also tried to fix it, but I couldn’t get back online. I had to call a technician to help me, and it took one hour to fix the problem.

By the time I returned to the meeting, it was already over. I missed the important part, which made my boss very angry. He told me not to let this happen again.

Since then, I always check my internet connection before any meeting.

scripts.name: MP3 Player (1)
scripts.html:
MP3 PLAYER

1 - I’d like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out.

You would like to buy an mp3 player.

Call your friend and ask about the mp3 player he / she is using.

Ask three or four questions that will help you decide whether you want to buy the product your friend is using.

Hi A, this Is B.

I would like to ask about your MP3 player.

I would like to buy a new one / MP3 player.

Where did you buy it?

  • What color is it?
  • How much is it?

What kinds of mp3 players do they have available?

Can you tell me how much they are?

Can you recommend anything?

Is there a website that I can see?

I wonder if there are any promotions?

Call me back asap, thank you.

2 - I'm sorry but there is a problem I need you to resolve.

You had borrowed your friend's mp3 player but broke it by accident.

Call your friend and explain the situation.

Give two or three alternatives that will help solve the situation.

Hi there Liz, this is Jim.

I'm really sorry but I have some bad news.

I accidentally broke your mp3 player.

I dropped it by accident and the screen is broken.

I feel terrible about what happened.

I would like to get it fixed for you

I would like to buy a new one for you

Please tell me what you want to do. I am fine with whatever you decide

Once again I'm really sorry for what happened.

Please, call me back when you get this.

Thank you.

3 - That’s the end of the situation. Do you have any personal experience when a device broke and you had trouble because of that?

What exactly happened and how did you fix the problem?

Tell me everything about that experience.

I remember a time when my cell phone broke.

I dropped it by accident and the screen cracked.

I tried to turn it on but it didn’t work/ nothing changed/ the screen didn’t display anything.

My boss sent me an important email about my work but I couldn’t open it.

I was confused/ worried.

I took it in for repairs.

I went to the Samsung service center.

I had to pay some money to replace the screen.

It was really frustrating.

Ever since that incident I always try to be more careful not to drop my phone.

Plus, I put on a phone case to protect my phone.

scripts.name: Management Office (1)
scripts.html:
1 - I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out.

You would like to find a house to live in. Call a management office and ask three or four questions about getting a house to live in.

Hello, is it the management office?

I would like to rent a three-bedroom apartment.

What kinds of apartments do you have available?

Can you tell me how much they are?

Can you recommend anything?

Is there perhaps a website I can see?

I wonder if there are any promotions.

Please call me back as soon as possible. Thank you.

2 - I'm sorry, but there is a problem I need you to resolve.

You have moved into the new house but found out that one of the windows in your apartment is broken. Call the repair shop.

Explain why you have to get a new window as soon as possible.

Hello, I'm a person who just moved in.

However, I found out that one of the windows is broken.

I need to get a new window.

- It is very dangerous at night.

- The wind is coming in and it's quite cold at night.

What kinds of windows do you have available?

Can you tell me how much they are?

Can you recommend anything?

Is there a website I can see?

I wonder if there are any promotions.

Please call me back as soon as possible. Thank you.

3 - That's the end of the situation.

Tell me about a time when you broke something at home.

What exactly happened and how did you solve the problem?

Give me all the details from beginning to end.

Câu cuối chủ đề furniture (bàn bị gãy chân)

I remember when a table in my room was broken.

My father bought this table for me on my 10th birthday. So, it was too old and its legs were getting weak.

One day, I put my bag on the table and one of the legs broke off.

All of my books fell on the floor.

I tried to get it fixed but it was impossible to fix it.

I was pretty sad because this table was a gift from my father and it held a lot of good memories from my childhood. Then, I decided to buy a new one.

So, this was a problem I had with my furniture.

scripts.name: Renting a car (1)
scripts.html:
Renting a car

1 - I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out.

You need to rent a car for about a week. Call the rental agency and ask several questions about the car you want to rent.

Hello, is it the rental agency?

I would like to rent a car for a week.

What kinds of cars do you have available?

Can you tell me how much they are?

Can you recommend anything?

Is there perhaps a website I can see?

I wonder if there are any promotions.

Please call me back as soon as possible. Thank you.

2 - I'm sorry, but there is a problem I need you to resolve.

You have received the rental car, but there are many problems with it.

Call the rental agency and explain the situation. Give two to three alternatives.

Hello, is it ABCrental agency?

I'm a person who rented a car from your agency.

I'm afraid there's something wrong with the car.

- The car is NOT clean.

I am not happy with the car.

I would like to get an exchange.

I would like to get a refund

Would that be possible?

I'm sorry for all the trouble.

Can you tell me when I can visit your office?

What are your business hours?

Please call me back as soon as possible. Thank you.

3 - That's the end of the situation.

Have you ever rented a car from a rental car agency?

Why did you rent the car? When and where did you rent the car?

Give me all the details about that experience.

Last week, I rented a car from a rental agency. I had a plan to travel with my family, so I went to a rental agency near my house. When I arrived, I told them the car I wanted. There were many cars to choose from, and I picked a white Toyota.

They asked for my ID and driving license, and they explained the insurance and rental contract to me. After everything was done, I drove the car home and we started our family trip the next day.

The car was modern and had comfortable seats, which made driving easier and less tiring. It also had great audio, so we enjoyed listening to music during the trip.

We had a wonderful trip, and I was really happy with the car. That’s the time I rented a car.

scripts.name: Performance (1)
scripts.html:
1 - I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out.

You want to get two tickets to see a performance during your vacation.

Call the box office and ask three or four questions to get tickets.

Chào hỏi:

Hello, is it cgv box office?

Hoàn cảnh:

I would like to buy some tickets for the performance this weekend.

Câu hỏi thông tin:

  • What kinds of tickets do you have available?
  • Can you tell me how much they are?
  • Can you recommend anything?
  • Is there perhaps a website I can see?
  • I wonder if there are any promotions.

Chào kết:

  • I’ll give you my credit card information.
  • Thank you very much for your help!

2 - I'm sorry, but there is a problem I need you to resolve.

On the day of the performance, you are very sick.

Call your friend and explain the situation and offer two different options to resolve this situation.

Hello, sammy. It's me, Huy.

I have some bad news.

I am sick right now. I am afraid I cannot make it to the performance.

Can you go without me?

Can you go with someone else?

Why don’t we go another time?

Can you tell me what you want to do? I am fine with whatever you decide.

I am sorry for all the trouble.

Please,...

Bye.

3 - That's the end of the situation.

Have you ever bought concert tickets or made plans for a trip, or made plans

for other things, but had to cancel because you could not make it?

When was it? What happened? Tell me everything that you did to resolve it.

I remember when I was supposed to go on a trip with my friends.

We had a plan to travel to Nha Trang last summer.

However, I got sick because I tested positive for Covid-19 the night before the trip.

I had a bad headache and a terrible sore throat.

I had a fever and bad cough

I had to stay inside and isolate myself from everyone.

I felt bad about missing the trip, but there was nothing I could do. I told my friends I couldn’t make it and apologized.

They felt sorry for me and hoped I would recover soon. In the end, we canceled the trip because they didn’t want to go without me.

In the end, I told them to go without me and have fun on the trip.

Looking back, it was a pity that I missed the trip that time.

scripts.name: Phone (1)
scripts.html:
PHONE

1 - I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out.

You would like to buy a new cell phone. Call a store and ask three or four questions about a new phone you would like to purchase.

Hello,is it the phone store?

I would like to buy a new phone.

What kinds of phones do you have available?

Can you tell me how much they are?

Can you recommend anything?

Is there perhaps a website I can see?

I wonder if there are any promotions.

Please call me back as soon as possible. Thank you.

2 - I'm sorry, but there is a problem I need you to resolve.

You have received the new phone but the features are not what you expected. You would like to return it to get a new phone.

Call the store, explain the situation and make arrangements to get a new product.

Hello, is it the phone store?

I am the person who bought a phone at your store.

I'm afraid there's something wrong with my phone.

The camera doesn’t work

I would like to get an exchange.

Would that be possible?

I'm sorry for all the trouble.

Can you tell me when I can visit your store?

What are your business hours?

Please call me back as soon as possible. Thank you.

3 - That's the end of the situation.

Have you ever bought a piece of technology which was not what you wanted or different from what you had expected?

Was the feature not what you wanted or did it just not work properly?

Tell me about a time when you bought some new technology.

Last month, I bought a new smartphone from a store.

However, when I got home, I realized the camera didn’t work.

I called the store to ask for an exchange.

The salesperson apologized and agreed to send me a new phone to my address.

They also gave me a voucher for my next purchase.

I was happy with the new phone.

So, it was a memorable experience when I bought a new phone.

scripts.name: Doctor appointment (1)
scripts.html:
APPOINTMENT

1 - I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out.

You would like to make an appointment to see the doctor.

Call the doctor's office and ask three or four questions about things you need to know. And then, set a time to go see the doctor.

Chào hỏi:

Hello, is it ABC doctor's office?

Hoàn cảnh:

I would like to have a regular health check.

I would like to make an appointment to see the doctor.

Hỏi thông tin:

  • Could you tell me when I can come?/ Could you tell me when the doctor is available?
  • Give me direction to your office?
  • Is it close to the subway station?
  • Is it within walking distance?
  • What are your business hours?
  • Can you recommend anything?
  • What should I prepare before coming?

Chào kết:

  • Please,...
  • Thank you,...

2 - I'm sorry, but there is a problem I need you to resolve.

Something has come up that prevents you from going in to see the doctor.

Call the doctor's office. And explain the situation.

Give two to three alternatives to make a new appointment with the doctor.

Hello, is it ABC doctor's office?

I am the person who is having an appointment with doctor A today.

I have some bad news.

Something at work has come up suddenly, so I have to take care of it right away.

I am afraid I cannot make it to the appointment.

Could you reschedule the appointment to another time?

Can I have an online appointment with the doctor?

I am sorry for all the trouble.

Please, give me…

Thank you.

3 - That's the end of the situation.

Have you ever had to change an appointment for a certain service?

What happened and what did you do?

Give me all the details about that experience.

Câu cuối của Appointment

I remember making a hair appointment recently.

- making a doctor appointment

- making a dentist appointment

- making an appointment for a massage

- making an appointment for a manicure/pedicure.

However, something at work came up suddenly, so I had to take care of it right away.

It was a serious problem with a new product, so I couldn’t leave until everything was solved.

Thus, I could not make it to my appointment.

I called the hair salon and told them that I could NOT go.

+the clinic +the hospital + the dentist +the spa

They were very understanding and agreed to reschedule my appointment to another day.

In the end, I made a new appointment and went another time.

scripts.html:
MOVIE

1 - I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out.

You want to take your friend to the movies. Call the movie theater

and ask three or four questions. Call the theater and ask two to three questions to get tickets for you and your friend.

Hello, is it … movie theater?

I would like to get two tickets.

What kinds of tickets do you have available?

Can you tell me how much they are?

Can you recommend anything?

Is there perhaps a website I can see?

I wonder if there are any promotions.

Please call me back as soon as possible. Thank you.

2 - I'm sorry, but there is a problem I need you to resolve.

When you and your friend arrive at the theater you discover that they've sold the wrong tickets to you. Explain the situation to the ticket seller at the booth. Offer two or three alternatives to solve the problem.

Hello, I'm a person who bought tickets for tonight's movie.

I'm afraid there's something wrong with my tickets.

I think I got the wrong tickets. I booked 2 tickets to see TITANIC, but these say KING KONG.

I would like to get an exchange.

I would like a refund.

Would that be possible?

I'm sorry for all the trouble.

3 - That's the end of the situation.

Have you ever bought concert tickets or made plans for a trip, or made plans for other things, but had to cancel because you could not make it? When was it? What happened? Tell me everything that you did to resolve it.

I remember when I was supposed to go on a trip with my friends.

We had a plan to travel to Nha Trang last summer.

However, I got sick because I tested positive for Covid-19 the night before the trip.

I had a bad headache and a terrible sore throat.

I had a fever and bad cough

I had to stay inside and isolate myself from everyone.

I felt bad about missing the trip, but there was nothing I could do. I told my friends I couldn’t make it and apologized.

They felt sorry for me and hoped I would recover soon.

In the end, we canceled the trip because they didn’t want to go without me.

Looking back, it was a pity that I missed the trip that time.

scripts.name: Concert (1)
scripts.html:
CONCERT

1 - I’d like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out.

You want to buy two tickets to go watch a concert tonight.

Call the theater and ask 2 to 3 questions about ways to get tickets.

Hello, is it theater’s office,

I want to watch the show tonight at 7 o’clock.

I would like to buy two tickets for me and my friend.

What kinds of tickets are available, and how much they are?

Can you recommend anything?

Is there a website I can check?

Do you have any promotions?

Please let me know as soon as possible.

Thank you.

2 - I'm sorry but there’s a problem I need you to resolve.

You have bought the concert tickets for today but at the last minute, you are so sick that you can’t even get out of bed.

Call your friend and explain your situation, give two or three alternatives to your friend.

Hi Jim, this is Huy.
I'm really sorry, but I have some bad news.
I'm feeling terrible right now and couldn’t even get out of bed this morning.
I think I can not make it to the concert tonight.

What do you want to do?
Why don’t you go by yourself?
If you don’t want to go alone, you can sell the ticket to someone else.
Or maybe you can go with someone else?
Let me know what you decide. I’m okay with whatever you choose.

3 - That’s the end of the situation

Have you ever made plans for something but had to cancel at the last minute because of something that happened unexpectedly?

Tell me everything about what had happened that prevented you from going.

I remember making a hair appointment recently.

- making a doctor appointment

- making a dentist appointment

- making an appointment for a massage

- making an appointment for a manicure/pedicure.

However, something at work came up suddenly, so I had to take care of it right away.

It was a serious problem with a new product, so I couldn’t leave until everything was solved.

Thus, I could not make it to my appointment.

I called the hair salon and told them that I could NOT go.

+the clinic +the hospital + the dentist +the spa

They were very understanding and agreed to reschedule my appointment to another day.

In the end, I made a new appointment and went another time.

scripts.name: PARK (1)
scripts.html:
PARK

Question 11 - I'd like to give you a situation to act out. You have made plans with your friend to go to a local park. Call your friend and ask them three to four questions about your plans.

Hi, John. It's me, Danny.

I am calling to ask about our plan to go to a local park.

What time do you want to meet?

What do you want to do at the park?

Where should we meet?

Do you want to have a picnic or go for a run?

Do you want to bring anything to eat?

Do we need to buy tickets to get in?

Please, give me a call ASAP

Thank you, bye.

Question 12 I'm sorry, but a problem has come up at the last minute. Now, you won't be able to meet your friend at the park. Call your friend and explain your situation. Tell your friend why you can't make it in detail. Give your friend one or two alternatives for what they can do.

[Phone ringing]

"Hi friend. I have bad news. I can't come to the park today. My car broke down on the way home. It stopped working, and I'm waiting for help. I need to take it to a car shop.

I'm very sorry to cancel so late. I know we wanted to meet. Maybe you can still go for a walk in the park alone? Or you could call Alex to join you instead?

Sorry again. We can try to meet another day when my car is fixed. Thanks for understanding."

Hi friend. I have some bad news. I can't come to the park today. My boss just told me I have to stay late at work. We have a big project due tomorrow, and it's not finished yet.

Can you tell me what you want to do?

Why DON'T we go next time?

What do you say if we go next week?

Or, maybe we could go another time.

Can you tell me what you think?

I'm fine with whatever you decide.

Give me a call when you get this. Thanks.

Question 13 Tell me about something memorable that happened to you at a park. Maybe there was a special event, or you met someone unexpectedly. Start by telling me some background information. Then, explain in detail what happened.

I remember bumping into my old friend at a park near my house last year.

I was taking walks to get some exercise.

Suddenly, I heard someone calling my name, I looked back and I saw my old friend from high school.

I went to her and said hi, I was very surprised and excited to see her after a long time.

Then, we walked around the park. We enjoyed the beautiful scenery and took many photos together. After that, we sat down on a bench and started to ask how each other was doing and did a lot of catching up.

It was very nice to see my friend again. Before leaving, we shared our contacts and we have been in touch ever since.

So, this was a memorable experience at the park I remember.

Question 12 I'm sorry, but there's a problem you need to resolve. You were supposed to meet your friend at the coffee shop, but something came up at the last minute. Call your friend, explain the situation, and provide two to three alternatives.

[Phone ringing]

Hi friend. I have some bad news. I can't come to the coffee shop today. My boss just told me I have to stay late at work. We have a big project due tomorrow, and it's not finished yet.

I'm really sorry I can't make it. I know we planned to meet. Here are some other ideas:

1. Can we meet tomorrow for lunch instead?

2. Maybe we can have a video call tonight after I finish work?

3. If you still want to go out, you could ask Sam to join you at the coffee shop.

Can you tell me what you want to do?

Why DON'T we go next time?

What do you say if we go next week?

Or, maybe we could go another time.

What do you think? Let me know if any of these work for you. Sorry again for the change in plans.

Question 13 Tell me about a memorable incident you had at a coffee shop. Maybe something unexpected happened in the coffee shop, or you met someone special. Start by giving me some background. And then tell me all the details about what happened.

I remember once having a terrible experience at a coffee shop

At first I went to a coffee shop with my friends, we choose a small Cafe near our University

The cafe looked sketchy but anyway we decided to get in

We ordered some milk tea and cakes.

I think I drink something that went bad

My stomach was upset

I had to go to the bathroom over and over again

I took some medicine to get better

Since then, I have tried to be more careful when choosing a coffee shop

scripts.name: Renting a bike (1)
scripts.html:
Question 11 I'd like to give you a situation to act out. Let's suppose that you are planning to rent a bike. Call the bike rental company and ask the clerk two or three questions.

Hello, is this the bike rental shop?

I'm calling to ask about renting a bike.

I would like to rent a bike for 3 days

What kinds of bikes do you have available?

Can you tell me how much they are?

Can you recommend anything?

Is there perhaps a website i can see?

I wonder if there are any promotions.

Plus, can you give me directions to your office?

Is it close to the subway station?

Is it within walking distance?

Please call me back as soon as possible.

Thankyou.

Question 12 I'm sorry, but there's a problem I need you to resolve. The bike rental company said they don't have the particular bike you're trying to rent. I would like you to explain to the staff why you really need it and suggest two to three alternatives to this matter.

Hi, I just heard that the bike I wanted isn’t available.

- Can you check if the bike might be available later today or tomorrow?

- Is there a similar bike available that I can rent instead?

- Are there any partner that might have the bike I need?

- Can you offer any discount or upgrade for the inconvenience?

- Can you recommend a bike with similar features that would suit my needs?

Question 13 That's the end of the situation. When was the last time you rented a bike? Why did you have to rent a bike? Where did you do it? Please tell me everything about renting a bike in detail.

I rented a bike when I went to Danang last summer.

My friend and I planned to bike all the way around the Han river.

There's a path where you can ride a bike.

Therefore, we needed good bikes and equipment.

Before the trip, we contacted a bike rental shop, and they set us up with (chuẩn bị cho chúng tôi) everything = set up(prepare) everything for us.

So, we had good bikes and helmets.

We planned to ride in the morning. We really enjoyed the fresh air and the view while riding along the river.

So, it was a great experience.

scripts.name: Party (1)
scripts.html:
Party

1 - I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. You have been invited to a friend's birthday party. The party will be held at a bar. Call your friend and ask three or four questions about the place that the party is going to be held at.

Hi John, this is Brian.

Happy birthday! Thanks for inviting me to your birthday party. I heard it's going to be held at a bar.

Which bar is it going to be held at?

Can you tell me how to get there?

Is the bar close to a subway station or a bus stop?

Also, what kind of bar is it?

What type of drinks are we having?

Is there going to be food there?

Anyway, thank you once again for inviting me to the party.

Please, call me when you get this.

Thank you.

2 - I'm sorry but there is a problem I need you to resolve. You have a test coming up tomorrow and cannot make it to your friend's birthday party. Call your friend, explain the situation, and give two to three alternatives regarding the situation.

Hi John, this is Brian.

I'm so sorry but I have some bad news. I don't think I can make it to your birthday party tomorrow. I actually have a test coming up and have to prepare for it.

I wish I could be there to celebrate your birthday.

However, this test is very important and there's nothing I can do.

I'm really sorry.

Why don't I take you out for lunch next week? I'll give you your gift when we have lunch.

Anyway, please have fun at the party.

Please, call me whenever you get this.

Thanks.

3 - That's the end of the situation. Have you ever had to cancel or change plans because of something that came up? What was the reason you had to change your plans? How did you solve the situation? Give me all the details.

I remember when I was supposed to go on a trip with my friends.

However, I got sick because I tested positive for Covid-19 the night before the trip.

I had a bad headache and a terrible sore throat.

I had a fever and bad cough

I had to stay inside and isolate myself from everyone.

I felt bad about missing the trip, but there was nothing I could do.

I told my friends that I could NOT make it and said I was sorry.

They felt bad because I couldn’t go on the trip and hoped that I could recover soon.

In the end, I told them to go without me and have fun on the trip.

Looking back, it was a pity that I missed the trip that time.
