scripts.name: Fitness center, Gym (1)
scripts.html:
Fitness center, Gym

1 - I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out.

You want to enroll in a class at a fitness center. Call the fitness center and ask questions about their programs.

Chào hỏi: Hello. Is it ABC fitness center/ gym?

Hoàn cảnh:

  • I would like to sign up for a membership.

Hỏi thông tin:

  • What kinds of programs do you have available?
  • Can you tell me how much they are?
  • Can you recommend anything?
  • Is there a website I can see?
  • I wonder if there are any promotions.

Chào kết:

  • Please,...
  • Thank you,...

2 - I'm sorry, but there is a problem I need you to resolve.There is an emergency and you cannot make it to the session with your personal trainer. Call your trainer and explain the situation. Give some alternatives to make arrangements for a schedule change.

- Chào hỏi: Hello, Mr. Kim. It's me, Alex.

- Hoàn cảnh:

I have some bad news.

Something at work has come up suddenly, so I have to take care of it right away.

I am afraid I cannot make it to the training session today.

- Giải quyết:

Can I reschedule my session to another time?

I would like to cancel the session today.

Can you send me the training exercise in advance, so I can keep up with it/ so I won't fall behind?

I am sorry for all the trouble.

- Chào kết:

Please,

Thank you…

3 -That's the end of the situation. Have you ever tried anything to become healthier? Tell me everything that you did to improve your health.

Before, I first started walking because I was fat/overweight/unhealthy.

Walking helped me to:

  • lose weight
  • stay healthy
  • keep a positive attitude
  • clear my mind
  • be physically active
  • be more creative

Since then, I take walks everyday (to the park near my place).

  • My interest in walking hasn't changed over the years.
  • I don’t change my walking routine/habit (over the years)

Now, although I don’t have much time for walking/this activity, I still try to spend time on it because I know it is good for me/my health.

So, this is why I still take walks now.

1 - I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. You would like to sign up at a gym nearby. Call the gym and ask three or four questions about the gym.

**You:** "Hello, is this [Gym Name]?"

**You:** "I'm interested in signing up. Can I ask a few questions?"

**You:** "How much does it cost to join?"

**You:** "What are your opening hours?"

**You:** "Do you offer fitness classes? And Are the classes included with the membership?"

**You:** "Do you have a swimming pool?"

**You:** "Is there parking available?"

**You:** "Thank you for the information! I’ll think about it and might visit the gym soon."

2 - I'm sorry but there is a problem I need you to resolve. You have signed up at the gym but you are not satisfied with the gym. Maybe the gym is not clean enough or there are too many people. Call the manager of the gym and make arrangements to get a refund.

Hello, is this the gym manager?

I'm calling about my gym membership. I want to cancel it and get my money back.

I'm not happy with the gym. It's too crowded all the time. I can never use the machines I want.

Also, the place isn't clean enough. The showers are dirty, and the equipment smells bad.

I signed up last month, but I don't want to keep coming. Can you please cancel my membership? I'd like all my money back.

What do I need to do to get a refund? Can you help me with this?

Thank you for your help.

3 - That's the end of the situation. What kind of things have you tried to become healthier? Perhaps you could have signed up at a gym. Tell me about the things that have made you a healthier person. What kind of impact did your efforts have on your life to stay healthy?

I've tried to do various things to stay healthy.

I work out as often as I can and take walks or go for a run in the evenings.

I also focus on eating properly, avoiding too much food or eating too late. I make sure to eat plenty of vegetables and fruits.

Getting enough sleep is important to me, and I always try to stay positive and look on the bright side.

These are some of the things I've been doing to stay healthy.

scripts.name: free time
scripts.html:
1. Where do people in your country go to in their free time? Do they go to the beaches? do they go to Parks or any other places? What are some popular locations that people go in their free time?

People often go to bar for social gatherings. They grab some drinks with their friends. Drinks break the ice and spice up the mood.

Plus people sometimes go to bars for staff dinners or after parties. It's a great chance to bond with coworkers.

Next people sometimes go to bars for special occasions such as birthday parties.

So people often go to bars to hang out with their friends in their free time .

  1. Did you have more free time or less free time back then? How was it different from your free time now?

I did not have that much free time when I was a kid.

I have to study day and night. I went to school early in the morning and came back home late at night.

I especially did not have much free time in my senior year of high school.

Once again, I did not have that much free time when I was a kid.

  1. Tell me about the last time you had some free time. When was it? What did you do? Who did you spend time with?

I remember watching a movie with my family recently.

Before watching the movie. We got some popcorn. We also got some nachos and soft drinks.

After watching the movie. We went to a ddecent korean restaurant. They had the best korean food in town. The food tasted so good because I was starving.

The beef I ordered was so juicy and tender. Plus we had some drinks while we ate. We ordered some beer it went well with the food. It was a very enjoyable dinner.
